entries.name: VIOLENT LEAF ADAMANTINE-STRENGTH WHIRLWIND
entries.body:
VIOLENT LEAF ADAMANTINE-STRENGTH WHIRLWIND
Classification: Taijutsu
Rank: A-Rank
Casting Time: Special
Range: 5 Feet
Duration: Instant
Components: CM, M
Cost: 18 Chakra
Keywords: Taijutsu
Description: As a part of casting this jutsu, you must currently have at least the Fourth Heavenly Breath: Wheeze or any of the Heavenly Breaths thereafter active or at least the Seimon from the 8 Inner Gates: Seimon Taijutsu Feat.
When you first enter any of the listed breathes or inner gates you may activate this jutsu once. When you do, you may immediately move up to 30 feet towards any hostile creature you can see. If you end your movement within 5 feet of the them, you can immediately make a single powerful roundhouse kick.
Make a melee Taijutsu attack. On a hit you deal 6 times your [Unarmed Damage] and the target must make a strength saving throw. On a failed save they are thrown back a number of feet equal to your strength modifier times 20. If they strike a solid surface that’s less than 5 feet thick, they tear through it if they have at least 10 or more feet remaining to be knocked back, taking 6d6 bludgeoning damage for each surface they go through.

entries.name: VIOLENT STRANGLING
entries.body:
VIOLENT STRANGLING
Classification: Taijutsu Rank: A-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: 5 Feet Duration: Instant
Components: CM, M Cost: 19 Chakra Keywords: Taijutsu Description: With a sudden movement you grip a targets throat with such speed most don’t get a chance to react. Make a melee Taijutsu attack against the target. On a hit, the target is grappled and restrained. The target also cannot make hand seals as you hold one of their hands. The target also gains +1 rank of exhaustion. At the end of each of the targets turns they gain +2 ranks of exhaustion. As an Action, on each of the targets turns, they can make a Strength saving throw to escape your grip on a success. When a creature would escape this jutsu they lose all ranks of exhaustion gained from this Jutsu

entries.name: WORLD BREAKER
entries.body:
WORLD BREAKER
Classification: Taijutsu Rank: A-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Self (60-foot Cube) Duration: Instant
Components: CM, M Cost: 19 Chakra Keywords: Taijutsu, Finisher Description: You strike the ground with such force that you destroy the surrounding area with little concern. All creatures in a 60-foot cube originating from you must make a Dexterity saving throw taking 10d10 bludgeoning damage as the surface is destroyed and pieces of the ground shoot out in random directions.
The affected area is counted as difficult terrain and creatures that are greater than 10 feet from each other are heavily obscured from one another.
Finisher: all creatures who fail their saving throw gain 3 ranks of Bruised.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10.
S-RANK:

entries.name: BLACK NERIUM
entries.body:
BLACK NERIUM
Classification: Taijutsu
Rank: S-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: 5 Feet
Duration: 1 minute
Components: CM, M
Cost: 30 Chakra
Keywords: Taijutsu, Medical, Kinjutsu
Description: You attempt to press a point on the base of a hostile creature’s neck. When you do, you reverse their bodies blood flow completely throwing their heart off and causing blood vessels to explode.
Make a melee Taijutsu attack. On a hit, the target must make a Constitution saving throw at the beginning of each of their turns for the next minute. Each time they would fail their saving throw, they suffer a -1 penalty to their Strength, Dexterity and Constitution ability checks, skill checks, attack rolls and saving throws for the duration and suffer 5d6 necrotic damage which cannot be reduced or resisted by any means.
A creature who would fail all 10 saving throws, dies. As every blood vessel in their body collapses. A creature who is targeted with a Jutsu with the medical keyword that would end conditions or restore hit points cast at S-Rank, has this jutsu’s effect immediately end.

BLUE ROSE
Classification: Taijutsu
Rank: S-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Self
Duration: 1 minute
Components: CM, M
Cost: Special (30 Chakra)
Keywords: Taijutsu, Kinjutsu
Description: You enter a state of absolute passion and ambition. You gain 2 special bonus actions called Rose Actions. You regain spent Rose Actions at the beginning of each of your turns for the duration. While gaining the benefit of this jutsu, you cannot gain the benefit of Ninjutsu, Genjutsu, Taijutsu or Bukijutsu that would provide you with additional special actions.
Rose Actions. This special bonus action can be used in place of any jutsu, skill or feature that would spend a bonus action.

entries.name: CRIMSON SKIES
entries.body:
CRIMSON SKIES
Classification: Taijutsu
Rank: S-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Self (45-foot cylinder)
Duration: Instant
Components: CM, M
Cost: 25 Chakra
Keywords: Taijutsu
Description: You punch skyward with enough force to ignite the air around you, sparking flames and cinder to erupt. This creates an updraft of flames made by pure kinetic friction. This in turn turns the sky red for any creature who is within 1 mile of you.
This sudden change in atmospheric pressure creates a sudden shift in air pressure creating a massive cyclone that lasts for but a moment.
All creatures (excluding you) within 45 feet of you must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save, they take 10d8 fire damage from the spark of flames or half as much on a success
Immediately after, all creatures in the same area must remake their saving throw. Creatures who failed their first saving throw makes this second saving throw at disadvantage. On a failed second saving throw, creatures are thrown 120 feet in a random direction taking 10d8 bludgeoning damage as they strike the ground or a solid surface. On a successful save, they take half damage and are instead thrown only 60 feet in a random direction.

entries.name: DAYTIME TIGER
entries.body:
DAYTIME TIGER
Classification: Taijutsu Rank: S-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: 30 Feet Duration: Instant Components: M Cost: 20 Chakra Keywords: Taijutsu, Finisher, Clash Description: This jutsu can only be cast as a Taijutsu Finisher. As part of the requirements of this jutsu, you must have at least the “Sixth Heavenly Breath: Gasp” or the 7th Gate of Wonder of the 8 Inner Gates class feature active.
You take your palm and tap it with a closed fist creating a vortex of air pressure. Make a range Taijutsu attack. On a hit the target takes 10d12 bludgeoning and 10d12 force damage. Each creature within 30 feet around the target creature must make a Dexterity saving throw. A target takes 10d10 Force Damage on a failed save, or half on a successful one.

entries.name: EVENING ELEPHANT
entries.body:
EVENING ELEPHANT
Classification: Taijutsu Rank: S-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: 60 Feet Line Duration: Instant Components: M Cost: 21 Chakra. Keywords: Taijutsu, Finisher, Clash Description: This jutsu can only be cast as a Taijutsu Finisher. This is the ultimate culmination of offensive Taijutsu. As a part of the activation of this jutsu, you must currently be under the effects of at least either Sixth Heavenly Breath: Gasp Taijutsu or 7th Gate of Wonder or higher.
Make 5 Taijutsu attacks against a target. Each attack you make is treated as a shockwave that affects all creatures in a 15-foot-wide, 60 feet line behind your initial target. On a hit, the target creature takes 5d10 bludgeoning damage. All creatures behind the target creature must make a Dexterity saving throw taking 5d8 force damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful one. (This Jutsu cannot score a critical hit)

entries.name: FINAL FURY
entries.body:
FINAL FURY
Classification: Taijutsu
Rank: S-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: 5 Feet
Duration: Instant
Components: CM, M
Cost: Special (88 Chakra)
Keywords: Taijutsu, Combination
Description: This jutsu can only be cast if you have one other caster who is within 15 feet of you. The second caster as a part of their reaction moves to a space within 5 feet of you that they can occupy.
You and the second caster perform a joint combined series of strikes attacking vital points across a targets body.
Each caster make three melee Taijutsu attacks, dealing their unarmed damage + 5d8 on a hit. If both casters successfully hit their target with all of their attacks the target must make a constitution saving throw vs the Taijutsu save DC of the caster with the highest DC. On a failed save the target gains 5 stacks of the Weakened condition for the next 24 hours.
Combination: When this jutsu is cast, it gains additional effects based on who has the highest Charisma modifier between both casters.
+0-1: No Change.
+2-3: Both casters gain a +2 bonus to their Taijutsu attack rolls.
+4-5: Both casters gain a +2 bonus to their Taijutsu attack rolls, +1d4 bonus to damage rolls and a +1 bonus to their Taijutsu save DC.

entries.name: HELL ON EARTH
entries.body:
HELL ON EARTH
Classification: Taijutsu
Rank: S-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Self (60-foot sphere)
Duration: Instant
Components: CM, M
Cost: 35 Chakra
Keywords: Taijutsu, Finisher
Description: As a requirement of casting this jutsu you must target a prone creature. This jutsu can only be cast as a Finisher.
You raise your hand to the sky, beckoning the heavens and projecting your essence of self into you hand. You then attempt to create a direct fissure through the prone target into the underworld with a single blow. When you strike the target, you also create a 60-foot radius sphere of destruction powered by your essence alone.
Make a single melee Taijutsu attack. On a hit, you deal 10d12 +80 bludgeoning damage.
Regardless of a hit or miss, all creatures, excluding you and the original target, must make a dexterity saving throw taking 10d8 + 80 bludgeoning damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success.
After using this jutsu, you cannot use it again until you complete a rest. If you attempt to use this jutsu a second time before you complete a rest, you must also spend 5 Hit dice in addition to the chakra cost.

entries.name: LEAF DRAGON GOD
entries.body:
LEAF DRAGON GOD
Classification: Taijutsu Rank: S-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: 120 feet Duration: Instant Components: M Cost: 28 Chakra. Keywords: Taijutsu, Finisher, Clash Description: An Ultimate Taijutsu created by a legendary master. You perform an upward spin kick which quickly becomes a pressurized tornado that shapes itself into a dragon with long whiskers. Move yourself up to 120 feet in any direction even turning corners and up walls. All creatures who you pass within 5 feet of, must make a Strength saving throw being pulled into the tornado and thrown to the end of it landing 5 feet in front of where ever you end your movement, taking 12d8 bludgeoning damage and taking additional damage as if they were falling. On a successful save they only take half damage. Creatures take twice the amount of falling damage as a result of this jutsu.
Creatures who fail the Strength saving throw must also succeed a constitution saving throw being slashed by the debris this Taijutsu picks up taking 6d8 slashing damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful save.

entries.name: NIGHT GUY
entries.body:
NIGHT GUY
Classification: Taijutsu
Rank: S-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Special
Duration: Instant
Components: CM, M
Cost: Special (1 Chakra)
Keywords: Taijutsu
Description: As a part of casting this jutsu, you must currently have at least the Seventh Heavenly Breath: Exhale or the 8th Gate of Death from the 8 Inner Gates Taijutsu Specialist, Passionate Youth class feature active.
You begin to emit an enormous amount of red steam, known as the ‘Steam of Blood’, and your chakra manifests into a red burning beast of your description around your body. You then shout an activation word of your choice, before dashing forward with such force that space in front of your becomes distorted.
You may select any creature or space you can see or within 120 feet of you. You move in as straight a line as possible. You move through all structures, environmental obstructions and anything similar as if you could phase through them. You ignore summoned constructs and structures created by Jutsu, features or traits.
Additionally, the target cannot gain the benefits of any Reaction they use until the beginning of their next turn.
You then kick, with the force required to distort time and space. Make a melee Taijutsu attack, at advantage, rerolling any result that’s less than 8 on the die. On a hit, the target must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, they are immediately killed, regardless of their current hit points or however many phase gates they have remaining. On a successful save, they take deal Xd12 + 100 bludgeoning damage, where X = the casters level + Proficiency + Taijutsu ability modifier.
If this would reduce a creatures hit points to 0, they are atomized, becoming unable to be revived by any means.
At the conclusion of this attack, all of the blood in the users body is boiled out of them, forcing the end of their Heavenly breaths and/or 8 Inner Gates, they then begin to turn to ash, crumbling into dust over the course of the next minute.

Description: You enter a state of absolute instinct and focus. You gain 2 special reactions called Lotus reactions. You regain spent Lotus reactions at the beginning of each of your turns for the duration. While gaining the benefit of this jutsu, you cannot gain the benefit of Ninjutsu, Genjutsu, Taijutsu or Bukijutsu that would provide you with additional special actions.
Lotus reactions. This special reaction can be used in place of any jutsu, skill or feature that would spend a reaction.

entries.name: WHITE LILY
entries.body:
WHITE LILY
Classification: Taijutsu
Rank: S-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Touch
Duration: Concentration, up to 1 minute
Components: CM, M
Cost: Special (25 Chakra)
Keywords: Taijutsu, Medical, Kinjutsu
Description: You press a point on the base of a willing ally’s spine. When you do, you release their bodies limited synapse response time, enhancing it, allowing an allied creature to move at the speed of thought.
For the duration, the target gains 2 additional bonus action and reaction. The target of this jutsu cannot concentrate on any other jutsu for the duration.
After one minute their body slows down, becoming weakened for 1 hour.
You cannot target yourself with this jutsu. If a creature benefiting from this jutsu gains 2 or more ranks of Shocked, they become stunned until the end of their next turn.
A creature cannot gain the benefits of this jutsu more than once per rest.

entries.name: BREATH OF BEASTS: FANG
entries.body:
BREATH OF BEASTS: FANG
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapons Range Duration: Instant
Components: CM, W (Any Melee), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain Description: You begin to collect and manifest chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon. The chakra begins to manifest in the form of any beast of your choice in any color that can be seen plainly by others.
You begin to swing wildly and unpredictably, fueled by instinct and primal urges. Make two melee Taijutsu attacks, dealing your [Weapons Damage] with each.
Chain 1: If you hit a single creature with both attacks, they must make a Strength saving throw, being knocked Prone on a failed save.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and it’s damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher increase the number of attacks by +1.

entries.name: BREATH OF EARTH: SMASH
entries.body:
BREATH OF EARTH: SMASH
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Self (Weapons Range Radius) Duration: Instant
Components: CM, W (Any Melee), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Earth Release, Chain Description: You begin to collect earth release chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon, magnifying its weight. You fool your opponent(s) into thinking you are striking and suddenly shift your attack into another angle.
All creatures of your choice must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save they take your weapons damage + 1d8 earth damage on a failed save, or half as much on a failed save.
Chain 1: All creatures within range who have ranks of any Mental condition, suffers a -2 penalty to their saving throw.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, you can change the saving throw to a Strength save.

entries.name: BREATH OF FLAME: UNKNOWING
entries.body:
BREATH OF FLAME: UNKNOWING
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Special Duration: Instant
Components: CM, W (Any Melee), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Fire Release, Chain Description: You begin to collect fire release chakra until it transforms into gouts of flame that erupt from your weapon. You then dash towards your target and perform a single powerful swipe attempting to decapitate them in one strike.
Select a creature you can see that you could reach using your full movement. Move into a space adjacent to the target creature within your movement range and make a single melee Taijutsu attack against one creature you can see. On a hit, you deal your weapons damage +4d6 fire damage.
Chain 1: This attacks critical threat range increases by +1.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher you can target a second creature moving again into a space adjacent to that creature and making another attack with this jutsu’s effect.

entries.name: BREATH OF ROSES: PLUM
entries.body:
BREATH OF ROSES: PLUM
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage, excluding from a Genjutsu. Range: Self (Weapon Range Radius) Duration: Instant
Components: CM, W (Any Melee), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Medical Description: You begin to collect medical chakra until it creates a visage of a poisonous flowers falling around you.
When you would take damage, you begin to make a series of rotating strikes to deflect as much damage as possible. Reduce the damage you would take by 2d8 and all hostile creatures adjacent to you must make a dexterity saving throw, taking 2d8 poison damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful save.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage reduced and dealt by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, on a failed save, affected creatures gain a rank of Envenomed.

entries.name: BREATH OF SOUND: ROAR
entries.body:
BREATH OF SOUND: ROAR
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Self (Weapons Range Radius) Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Melee), NT (Any explosive tool), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Sensory, Chain Description: You begin to collect chakra until it manifests into the shape of a sound note hovering over your eyes.
All creatures in range, excluding yourself, must make a constitution saving throw. On a failed save, they take your weapons damage + 1d6 and gain a rank of Dazzled on a failed save.
Chain 1: A creature who fails by 5 or more gain a rank of Confused.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage of this jutsu by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, you can select a number of creatures to become immune to this jutsu’s casting equal to your proficiency bonus.

entries.name: BREATH OF THUNDER: FLASH
entries.body:
BREATH OF THUNDER: FLASH
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Special Duration: Instant
Components: CM, W (Any Melee), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Lightning Release Description: You begin to collect lightning release chakra until it sparks off of your weapon and body with violent jolts.
Select a creature you can see within 30 feet and move into a space adjacent to the target creature within that range. Make a single melee Taijutsu attack against the target creature. On a hit, you deal your weapons damage + 2d6 lightning damage.
Chain 1: If the target creature has Temporary hit points, this attack gains a +2 bonus to its critical threat range.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank, select a second creature within 30 feet of the first target and move into a space adjacent to them making a second attack.

entries.name: BREATH OF WATER: SURFACE
entries.body:
BREATH OF WATER: SURFACE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapons range Duration: Instant
Components: CM, W (Any Melee), M Cost: 5 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Water Release Description: You begin to collect and manifest water release chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon. The water release chakra begins to transform into streams of water, capable of being seen and felt as you then move to strike with a powerful concentrated attack.
Make a single melee Taijutsu attack against one creature you can see. On a hit, you deal your weapons damage + 2d12 cold damage and the target must make a strength saving throw being dazed on a failed save.
Chain 1: This jutsu’s attack roll cannot be made at disadvantage or with penalties to hit as a result of a condition or effect originating from a hostile creature.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d12. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher and the target of your attack has ranks of a Physical condition, you make your attack at advantage.

entries.name: BREATH OF WIND: CUTTER
entries.body:
BREATH OF WIND: CUTTER
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapon Range Duration: Instant
Components: CM, W (Any Melee), M Cost: 5 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Wind Release Description: You begin to collect wind release chakra until it spirals around the user’s weapon creating whipping torrents of wind. You use this enhanced field of wind to propel you towards your enemy with a circular strike
Make a melee Taijutsu attack comparing its results against all creatures within your weapons range, dealing your weapons damage + 1d8 wind damage.
Chain 1: Affected creatures must make a Dexterity saving throw, on a failed save, this attack ignores up to 4 DR a creature has.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d4.

entries.name: CRIPPLING STRIKE
entries.body:
CRIPPLING STRIKE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapons Range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any), M Cost: 5 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You focus your weapons attack on crippling your enemy, to make them far less effective than they are currently. Make a Taijutsu attack based on the weapon used for this jutsu, dealing your [Weapons Damage] + 2d10. On a hit, the target must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save they are Weakened.
Chain 1: You can make an additional attack targeting a different creature in range.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

entries.name: DEVILS GAMBIT
entries.body:
DEVILS GAMBIT
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Bonus Action Range: Self Duration: 1 Round
Components: W (Any), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You take a bet fit for a devil. At the cost of enhancing your weapons lethality and accuracy you throw caution to the wind.
Until the beginning of your next turn, the first weapon or Taijutsu attack made as a result of a Bukijutsu you cast, is at advantage and you increase your weapons damage die by 1.
But in exchange for this bet, all creatures first attack made targeting you is at advantage.

entries.name: DRAGON FLY DASH
entries.body:
DRAGON FLY DASH
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: 60 feet Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any), M Cost: 5 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain Description: You launch your weapon towards an allied creature you can see in range, ordering them to strike with it in your place.
Select one willing creature you can see in range and you throw your chosen weapon to them. Until the end of the current turn, the weapon thrown retains all bonuses and effects as if you were wielding it.
The target creature can spend their reaction to make one melee Taijutsu attack, targeting a creature in their range, dealing the weapons damage +2d8 using their statistics and immediately return the weapon back to you as part of the same action.
Chain 1: They can make an additional attack as part of their reaction.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

entries.name: FLYING SWALLOW: CROSS
entries.body:
FLYING SWALLOW: CROSS
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapon Range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Dual Wield), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: As a part of the activation of this jutsu, you must have a different weapon in each hand that would qualify you for dual wielding. You make swinging cuts in a single stoke by swinging both of your weapons inward.
Make two Taijutsu attacks, each can be vs a different enemy. On a hit, you deal [Weapons damage] + 1d10
Chain 1: The target must make a strength saving throw to avoid being disarmed of their weapon or item they are holding. At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d4.

Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapon Range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Dual Wield), M Cost: 5 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: As a part of the activation of this jutsu, you must have a different weapon in each hand that would qualify you for dual wielding.
You spin like a top striking all creatures in your immediate vicinity. All creatures within your weapons range, must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save they take your weapons damage + 2d4 or half as much on a success.
Chain 1: Creatures who failed their save also gain a rank of Bruised.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

entries.name: FLYING SWALLOW: STRAIGHT LINE
entries.body:
FLYING SWALLOW: STRAIGHT LINE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Self (30-foot line) Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Dual Wield), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: As a part of the activation of this jutsu, you must have a weapon in both hands that meet this Bukijutsu component requirements.
You dash in a straight line, up to 30 feet, moving through any hostile creatures space you come across, ending your movement in a space up to 30 feet away from you, in a straight line.
Make two melee Taijutsu attacks. All creatures, of your choice, whose space you passed through as a result of this jutsu count as targets for these two melee Taijutsu attacks, comparing their results to each creatures AC.
On a hit, you deal either of your [Weapons Damage]
Chain 1: Affected creatures must make a Dexterity saving throw, being pulled with you, and ending their movement within 5 feet of the space you end your movement on.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

entries.name: MANIPULATED TOOLS: BINDING METEOR
entries.body:
MANIPULATED TOOLS: BINDING METEOR
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: 30 feet Duration: Instant
Components: W (Weapon Scroll), M Cost: 3 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You summon forth a weighted chain from your weapon scroll and use it to restrain multiple targets you can see within range. Make a melee Taijutsu attack against up to three targets, who are within 30 feet of one another.
On a hit you grapple them and chain them to each other. Creatures chained together and pulled to be within 10 feet of one another and cannot move more than 10 feet from one another while chained in this way.
A creature chained by this jutsu can, as an action, make a Dexterity (Acrobatics) or (Sleight of Hand) check vs your Taijutsu save DC, escaping the chains on a success.
Chain 1: A creature who fails this check makes it harder to escape for other chained creatures. All other chained creatures who attempt to escape after another creature has failed, suffers a -2 penalty to their check, until the end of their next turn.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target by +1.

entries.name: MANIPULATED TOOLS: BLADE KICK
entries.body:
MANIPULATED TOOLS: BLADE KICK
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: 30 feet Duration: Instant
Components: W (Weapon Scroll), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain Description: You summon forth series of swords, knives and spears that you kick and launch towards a creature to impale them. Make a range Taijutsu attack dealing 4d8 piercing damage and the affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining a rank of Bleed on a failure.
Chain 1: On a failed save, affected creature also has its movement speed reduced to 0 until the end of their turn when the summoned weapons are dispelled automatically.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target by +1.

entries.name: MANIPULATED TOOLS: BLADE RAIN
entries.body:
MANIPULATED TOOLS: BLADE RAIN
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: 60 feet (10-foot Cube) Duration: Instant
Components: W (Weapon Scroll), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You unravel your weapon scroll in the air, and reflexively summon forth a series of swords, knives and spears that rain down bombarding a space you can see within range. All creatures in a 10-foot cube originating from a point you can see within range, must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, they take 3d6 in piercing damage or half as much on a success.
Chain 1: The affected area becomes difficult terrain until the end of your next turn. The first time a creature would walk through any affected space, they take 4 piercing damage from the scattered weaponry protruding from the ground.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

entries.name: MANIPULATED TOOLS: BLADE WALL
entries.body:
MANIPULATED TOOLS: BLADE WALL
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Reaction, which you take, when you take damage. Range: Self (10-foot radius) Duration: Instant
Components: W (Weapon Scroll), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You unravel your weapon scroll in a circle around you as you summon a series of bladed weapons in retaliation. First, reduce the damage you would take by 3d6 and all creatures in a 10-foot radius centering on you must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save they take 3d6 piercing damage and the next attack they make, is at disadvantage or half damage on a successful save and no further effect.
Chain 1: You can select the creatures affected by this jutsu.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage reduction and damage by 1d6.

entries.body:
PAPER BOMB BARRAGE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: 30 Feet Duration: Instant
Components: NT (1 Paper Bomb) Cost: 5 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You prepare a cluster of paper bombs which are consumed in the casting of this jutsu, in between your fingers on both hands and launch them at a single Target covering them in the prepared Bombs.
A target you can see within range and all creatures within 10 feet of them, makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d4 Fire Damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful one.
Chain 1: Creatures who failed their save gain a rank of Burned.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can mark by +1.

entries.name: STILL POND, RACING RIVER
entries.body:
STILL POND, RACING RIVER
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapons Range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any), M Cost: 3 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You hold your weapon in a perfect perpendicular stance as you wait for the moment to strike. First, mark a creature within range. Then, until the beginning of your next turn, when that marked creature would cast a jutsu or make an attack against a creature other than you while in your weapon’s range, you strike out making a Taijutsu attack against the triggering creature based on the type of weapon you are wielding. On a hit you deal your [Weapon’s Damage] + 1d12.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d12.

entries.name: WEAPON DEFLECT
entries.body:
WEAPON DEFLECT
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 reaction, which you take when you would take damage. Range: Self Duration: 1 round
Components: W (Any), M Cost: 5 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You enter a defensive stance with your weapon parrying the incoming weapon attack. You gain a +2 bonus to your AC until the end of the current turn.
Additionally, you can increase your next weapon attacks damage by +2d6.
Chain 1: This AC bonus lasts until the beginning of your next turn.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage increase by 1d6.

entries.name: AFTERGLOW
entries.body:
AFTERGLOW
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: C-Rank Casting Time: 1 Bonus Action Range: 30 Feet. Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Melee), M Cost: 6 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You take a reverse grip with your weapon and prepare to cut down everyone in your way. Select a space within range. You dash through at blinding speeds to that select location. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity. All creatures whom you pass through while on the way to the select location are the targets of your attacks. Make a single melee Taijutsu attack, comparing the result against the AC of each creature you pass through while moving. On a hit, you deal your weapons damage die. You end your movement in the selected space.
Chain 1: If the next Bukijutsu you cast has the Chain keyword, reduce its cost by 2.
Chain 2: If the next Bukijutsu you cast forced any of the affected creatures to make a saving throw, they make their saving throw with a -2 penalty.

entries.name: BREATH OF BEASTS: DEVOUR
entries.body:
BREATH OF BEASTS: DEVOUR
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: C-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapons Range Duration: Instant
Components: CM, W (Any Melee), M Cost: 7 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain Description: You begin to collect and manifest chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon. The chakra begins to manifest in the form of any beast of your choice in any color that can be seen plainly by others.
You begin to swing wildly and unpredictably, fueled by instinct and primal urges. Make two melee Taijutsu attack. On a hit, you your weapons damage + 1d8. If you made at least one successful hit, then the affected creature must make a Strength saving throw, being Weakened on a failed save.
Chain 1: Creatures who fail their saving throw, also have their speed reduced by half.
Chain 2: Creatures who fail their saving throw, are also Slowed until the end of their next turn. The Slowed condition is treated as a Physical condition when applied this way.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

entries.name: BREATH OF EARTH: BIPOLAR
entries.body:
BREATH OF EARTH: BIPOLAR
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: C-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapon Range Duration: Instant
Components: CM, W (Any Melee), M Cost: 7 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Earth Release, Chain Description: You begin to collect earth release chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon, magnifying its weight. You spin with such power that anything standing in your way becomes a memory.
Make a single melee Taijutsu attack, comparing the result against creatures in your weapons range AC. On a hit, you deal your weapons damage + 2d6 earth damage.
Chain 1: If your attack result is 5 or higher than the targets AC, you ignore up to 4 of a creatures DR.
Chain 2: The affected creatures must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining 1 rank of bruised on a failed save.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank, this attack is so fierce you gain +4 DR until the beginning of your next turn.

entries.name: BREATH OF FLAME: UNDULATION
entries.body:
BREATH OF FLAME: UNDULATION
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: C-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Self (10 feet)
Duration: Instant
Components: CM, W (Any Melee), M Cost: 7 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Fire Release, Chain Description: You begin to collect fire release chakra until it transforms into gouts of flame that erupt from your weapon. You spin striking all creatures within range attempting to decapitate them. All creatures of your choice must make a dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, they take your [Weapons Damage] + 2d6 fire damage and are Dazed.
Chain 1: Creatures who failed their save gain a rank of Bleed.
Chain 2: Creatures who failed their save gain a rank of Burned.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage reduced by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the radius of this jutsu by +10 feet.

entries.name: BREATH OF ROSES: HANAGOROMO
entries.body:
BREATH OF ROSES: HANAGOROMO
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: C-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action. Range: Weapons Range Duration: Instant
Components: CM, W (Any Melee), M Cost: 7 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Medical, Chain Description: You begin to collect medical chakra until it creates a visage of a poisonous flowers falling around you. You unleash a single strike that bends, curves and twists around you as if you made multiple strikes at once. Make a melee Taijutsu attack dealing [Weapon Damage] + 4d6 and forcing the target to make a Constitution saving throw, being Weakened on a failed save.
Chain 1: The next time the affected creature would spend chakra they take 2d6 + their spent chakra, in poison damage.
Chain 2: Creatures who failed their save gain an additional rank of Weakened.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage increased by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, you can make one additional attack, targeting a different creature in range.

entries.name: BREATH OF SOUND: SCORE
entries.body:
BREATH OF SOUND: SCORE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: C-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Self Duration: Concentration, up to 1 minute
Components: CM, W (Any Melee), M Cost: 6 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Sensory Description: You begin to collect chakra until it manifests into the shape of a sound note hovering over your eyes.
For the duration you do not spend chakra to maintain this jutsu, instead you must spend a bonus action to maintain it. Choose one of the following tempos when you cast this jutsu. You can the benefit of this tempo until the beginning of your next turn. At the beginning of each of your turns thereafter, you can select a different tempo if you would like.
Moderato: You strike with great force to the strum of the battle. The first time each turn you would deal damage with an attack you make with a Bukijutsu with the Breath of Sound prefix; its damage is increased by +1 damage die.
Allegretto: Breath of Sound Bukijutsu you cast has their save DC increased by +1.
Vivacissimo: You speed yourself up to strike at the right time, when they are at the most vulnerable. You have advantage on the first melee weapon or Bukijutsu with the Breath of Sound prefix, each turn.
Andante: You match your pace to your opponents to defend and parry perfectly against their every move. You gain a special reaction which can only be used when you would take damage, reducing the amount taken by an amount equal to your weapons damage.

entries.name: BREATH OF THUNDER: SWARM
entries.body:
BREATH OF THUNDER: SWARM
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: C-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Weapon Range
Duration: Instant
Components: CM, W (Any Melee), M Cost: 7 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Lightning Release, Chain Description: You begin to collect lightning release chakra until it sparks off of your weapon and body with violent jolts. You surround the enemy with waves of arched lightning swift strikes and attack them from all directions.
Make two melee Taijutsu attacks using your weapon, dealing your [Weapons Damage] + 1d8 lightning damage. If the target has the Shocked condition, you make your attacks with a +1 bonus to critical threat range.
Chain 1: Affected creature must make a Dexterity saving throw, being disarmed on a failed save and their weapon thrown 10 feet in any direction of your choice.
Chain 2: Affected creature must make a Dexterity saving throw, gaining a rank of Bleed on a failed save.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage dealt by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, if the target has the Shocked condition, you make your attacks with advantage.

entries.name: BREATH OF WATER: WHEEL
entries.body:
BREATH OF WATER: WHEEL
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: C-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Weapon Range
Duration: Instant
Components: CM, W (Any Melee), M Cost: 7 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Water Release, Chain Description: You begin to collect and manifest water release chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon. The water release chakra begins to transform into streams of water, as you spin forward, attacking in a circular motion.
Move into a space you can see within your movement speed range, then each creature of your choice, within your weapons range must make a Dexterity Saving Throw. On a failed save, you deal your [Weapons Damage] + 1d10 Cold damage they gain 1 rank of chilled or half as much damage on a successful save. A creature who makes a save that is Chilled or Dazed suffer a -2 penalty to their saving throw.
Chain 1: If used near a sufficient source of water, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or your weapon gains +1 rank of the Reach property until the end of the current turn.
Chain 2: Creatures who fail their saving throw, gain an additional rank of Chilled.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

move into a space you can see within your movement speed range, then each creature of your choice, within your weapons range must make a dexterity saving throw. on a failed save, you deal your [weapons damage] + 1d10 cold damage they gain 1 rank of chilled or half as much damage on a successful save. a creature who makes a save that is chilled or dazed suffer a -2 penalty to their saving throw.
chain 1: if used near a sufficient source of water, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or your weapon gains +1 rank of the reach property until the end of the current turn.
chain 2: creatures who fail their saving throw, gain an additional rank of chilled.
at higher ranks: for each rank you cast this jutsu above c-rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10. bukijutsu water release chain

entries.name: BREATH OF WIND: CLAWS
entries.body:
BREATH OF WIND: CLAWS
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: C-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Weapons Range
Duration: Instant
Components: CM, W (Any Melee), M Cost: 7 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Wind Release, Chain Description: You begin to collect wind release chakra until it spirals around the user’s weapon creating whipping torrents of wind. You lift your weapon upwards towards the right, above your head and unleashes four vertical strikes at once down on the enemy resembling claws.
Make four melee Taijutsu attacks against a single creature, record the number of successful hits. If you score at least one attack, you deal your [Weapons Damage] +1d8 wind damage. For every attack that hits, beyond the first, you deal an additional 1d8 wind damage. If you roll a critical hit on any of these attacks, you increase the wind damage by 2d8.
Chain 1: Affected creature must make a Strength saving throw, being thrown 20 feet in a direction of your choice (excluding up), on a failed save.
Chain 2: Affected creature must make a Dexterity saving throw, gaining a rank of Lacerated on a failed save.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of attacks you can make by +1. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, Swirl. Affected creature spreads all Elemental conditions currently affecting them around to all creatures, excluding yourself within 5 feet. Hostile creatures within 5 feet the target gains 1 rank of all Elemental conditions currently affecting it.

entries.name: BRUTAL BLOCK
entries.body:
BRUTAL BLOCK
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: C-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Reaction, which you take when you would take damage.
Range: Self
Duration: 1 Round
Components: W (Any), M Cost: 6 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You raise your weapon to block incoming damage at its source.
You raise your weapons to guard yourself. Roll 2d6, and record the result. You reduce the triggering damage and the first damage taken each turn, until the beginning of your next turn, by the result.
Chain 1: The next attack you make before the end of your next turn, increases its critical threat range by +1.
Chain 2: A creature in your weapons range when you reduce damage, takes damage equal to the result.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage reduced by 1d6.

entries.body:
CHAKRA EDGE
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: C-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Self
Duration: Concentration, up to 1 minute
Components: W (Any Ranged), M
Cost: 6 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu
Description: You lace your weapon in chakra reinforcing it. For the duration, you cannot lose concentration of this jutsu as a result of damage and the first time each turn you would deal damage with a weapon or Taijutsu attack, you increase your weapons damage die by +1.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank, you instead increase your weapons damage die by +2.

entries.name: FLYING SWALLOW: FLURRY GUARD
entries.body:
FLYING SWALLOW: FLURRY GUARD
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: C-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Reaction, which you take when you would take damage.
Range: Weapon Range
Duration: 1 Round
Components: W (Any Dual Wield), M
Cost: 11 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu
Description: As a part of the activation of this jutsu, you must have a weapon in both hands that meet this Bukijutsu’ s component requirements.
You raise both of your weapons blocking an incoming flurry of attacks in a powerful guarded stance.
You gain a +4 bonus DR vs Damage you take from the triggering creature. Each additional time the triggering would deal damage to you before the beginning of your next turn, you gain an additional +2 DR.
When the triggering creature’s attacks or Jutsu concludes, you send all of that built up defense back at them. Make two melee Taijutsu attacks, one with each weapon. On a hit, you deal your [Weapons Damage] + 1d6 + Total DR bonus gained as a result of this jutsu.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

entries.name: FLYING SWALLOW: PENETRATE
entries.body:
FLYING SWALLOW: PENETRATE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: C-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Touch Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Dual Wield), M Cost: 9 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: As a part of the activation of this jutsu, you must have a weapon in both hands that meet this bukijutsu component requirements. You take your weapon and infuse chakra into the heels of your feet and use the increased power to penetrate whatever is in your way. Make two melee Taijutsu attacks against up to two enemies within 5 feet of you dealing your weapons damage + 3d6, you do not add your ability modifier to damage.
Affected creatures must make a constitution saving throw having their AC is reduced by 1d4 for each successful hit, until the end of your next turn.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of attacks by +1

entries.name: GUARDIAN KNIGHT
entries.body:
GUARDIAN KNIGHT
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: C-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Bonus Action
Range: Self
Duration: Concentration, up to 1 minute.
Components: W (Any Armor), M Cost: 9 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You solidify your defenses and reinforce your position. You cannot lose concentration of this jutsu as a result of damage. For the duration, you gain bonus abilities or statistics based on the type of armor you are wearing;
Light Guardian. While wearing light armor, you gain a +10 bonus to movement speed, and a +2 bonus to your Dexterity saving throws and as a reaction to taking damage, you can dodge out of the way of some of it, reducing incoming damage by your proficiency bonus.
Moderate Guardian. While wearing medium armor, you gain a +1 bonus to your AC and increase your armors Reinforce value by +4, and as a reaction to seeing an allied creature within 20 feet of you take damage, you can move into an adjacent space next to them and aid them, granting them a +1 bonus to their AC, and a +2 bonus to their DR against the triggering damage.
Heavy Metal. While wearing heavy armor, increase its Reinforce value by +6, and as a Reaction, to seeing an allied creature within 15 feet of you take damage, you can move into an adjacent space near them and intercept the damage, taking it as if you were the original target, and you can apply your current Reinforce value to it.

entries.name: MIKIRI COUNTER
entries.body:
MIKIRI COUNTER
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: C-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Reaction, which you take when you or an allied creature within 5 feet of you take damage from a melee attack
Range: Self (or 5 Feet)
Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any), M Cost: 6 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You see a melee attack coming and your body doesn’t allow it to proceed any further. You instinctively use your hand or feet to not only attempt to parry the attack, but to also drive the attack into the ground, getting it stuck and opening the triggering creature up to a counter attack.
When you or an allied creature is hit with a melee attack, you gain a +4 bonus to your AC against the triggering attack. If their attack misses as a result, you can make a weapon attack against them dealing your [Weapons Damage].
Chain 1: If you score a hit with your weapon attack, reduce the targets AC by 2, until the end of their next turn.
Chain 2: You may make two attacks, against the triggering creature, regardless if they miss or not.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the counter attack damage by 1d8.

entries.name: TRIPLE WINDMILL BLADES
entries.body:
TRIPLE WINDMILL BLADES
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: C-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: 60ft Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Thrown) Cost: 6 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain Description: You launch your prepared weapons into two different directions intentionally avoiding hitting your target then pulling on the battle wire to cause them to avert their direction and change trajectory. Target Creature has the wires circle them until the weapons land in the ground locking them into place.
Target creature must make a Dexterity Saving throw being restrained in place on a failed save. A creature restrained by this jutsu can, as an action make a Strength check vs your Taijutsu save DC to escape, ending this jutsu’s effect.
Chain 1: On a failed save, the affected creature also takes 2d8 + your Taijutsu ability modifier, as they are struck by your launched weapon.
Chain 2: On a successful save, the affected creature is grappled until the beginning of their next turn.
VIPER’S RETREAT
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: C-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Weapons range
Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Melee Weapon), M
Cost: 7 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu
Description: You take a step back and then push forward attempting to strike. Make a melee attack against a creature in range, dealing your [Weapons Damage] + 3d8 on a hit. Regardless, if your attack is successful or not, you can move up to 10 feet without provoking attacks of opportunity until the end of the current turn.
Chain 1: You cannot make this attack with disadvantage.
Chain 2: The affected creatures next attack is made at disadvantage.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.
B-RANK:

entries.name: BATON PASS
entries.body:
BATON PASS
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: B-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Bonus Action after hitting an enemy with a weapon or Taijutsu attack
Range: 30 feet
Duration: Concentration, Up to 1 Minute
Components: W (Any)
Cost: 12 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu
Description: You quickly shift the momentum of the fight by creating an opening for an ally. You can give an ally within range an opening to spend their reaction to cast a Ninjutsu, Genjutsu or a Taijutsu with the Finisher keyword against the target creature.

entries.name: BREATH OF EARTH: JUSTICE
entries.body:
BREATH OF EARTH: JUSTICE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: B-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapons Range Duration: Instant
Components: CM, W (Any Melee), M Cost: 12 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Earth Release, Chain, Clash Description: You begin to collect earth release chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon, magnifying its weight.
Make 2 melee Taijutsu attacks as you strike with a flurry of weapon attacks followed by manifestations of earth release chakra of your design. On a hit, you deal your [Weapons Damage] + 2d8 earth damage.
An affected creature must make a Strength saving throw as you disable them on a failed save. A disabled creature cannot wield weapons or use hand seals (HS) for the next minute. A disabled creature remakes their saving throw at the end of each of their turns, ending the disabled effect on them on a success.
Chain 2: If both attacks were successful against the same creature, they make their saving throw at disadvantage.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

entries.name: BREATH OF FLAME: RENGOKU
entries.body:
BREATH OF FLAME: RENGOKU
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: B-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action.
Range: Self (30-foot line)
Duration: Instant
Components: CM, W (Any Melee), M Cost: 12 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Fire Release, Chain, Clash Description: You begin to collect fire release chakra until it transforms into gouts of flame that erupt from your weapon.
Select a space you can see within range that passes through one or more creatures in a 10-foot wide, 30-foot-long line, originating from you. You then move to a space at the end of this line that can hold you leaving behind a burning gout of flame in your wake.
Make one melee Taijutsu attack, comparing the result against the AC of all creatures whose space your line passes through. On a hit you deal your [Weapons Damage] +6d6 Fire Damage. If you score a critical hit with this attack, only one creature, of your choice suffers the effects of a critical hit.
Chain 2: Your attack is so savage that the damage you deal ignores DR as a result of Jutsu.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, if you score a critical hit with this attack, all creatures suffer the effects of the critical hit.

entries.name: BREATH OF ROSES: FUTILITY
entries.body:
BREATH OF ROSES: FUTILITY
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: B-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action.
Range: Weapons Range
Duration: Instant
Components: CM, W (Any Melee), M Cost: 12 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Medical, Chain, Clash
Description: You begin to collect medical chakra until it creates a visage of a poisonous flowers falling around you.
Select one create you can see within range as you begin to imitate a throned stem striking them with each passing gesture.
Make three melee Taijutsu attacks with your weapon, dealing your [Weapons Damage] + 2d6 poison damage.
An affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw gaining 1 rank of Weakened and Envenomed on a failed save.
Chain 2: If the affected creature would regain hit points or gain temporary hit points before the end of your next turn, that effect fails and they instead take additional damage equal to the hit points or temporary hit points they would gain.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

You make a singular forward slash as lightning forms an image of a beast of your description behind you.
Move yourself into a space adjacent to a creature of your choice within range that can hold you and make a melee Taijutsu attack.

Chain 2: Your attack is so swift, that your attacks ignore bonuses to AC as a result of Jutsu.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

chain 2: your attack is so swift, that your attacks ignore bonuses to ac as a result of jutsu.
at higher ranks: for each rank you cast this jutsu above b-rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10. bukijutsu lightning release chain clash

entries.name: BREATH OF WATER: FLUX
entries.body:
BREATH OF WATER: FLUX
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: B-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Self (15-foot radius)
Duration: Instant
Components: CM, W (Any Melee), M Cost: 12 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Water Release, Chain, Clash Description: You begin to collect water release chakra until it transforms into streams of water, as you perform a series of attacks that shapes a dragon made of water.
Select a number of creatures you can see within range. Move yourself into a space adjacent to the last creature chosen that can hold you. Make a melee Taijutsu attack comparing the result against the AC of each creature.
On a hit, you deal your [Weapons Damage] + 4d8 Cold damage. If any target has any ranks of the chilled, or are Dazed, you make your attacks at advantage. (If you score a critical hit with this attack, only one creature, of your choice suffers the effects of a critical hit.)
Chain 2: For each creature you reduce to 0 hit points, you gain +4 temporary hit points at the conclusion of this jutsu’s effect, up to a max of 20 temporary hit points.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

entries.name: BREATH OF WIND: GUSTS
entries.body:
BREATH OF WIND: GUSTS
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: B-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Self (30-foot line)
Duration: Instant
Components: CM, W (Any Melee), M Cost: 12 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Wind Release, Chain, Clash Description: You begin to collect wind release chakra until it spirals around the user’s weapon creating whipping torrents of wind. You spin sideways, rotating your body in an uppercut motion, forcing the wind to create a massive and powerful arcing slash.
All creatures of your choice in a 10-foot wide, 30-foot line originating from you must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking your [Weapons Damage] + 2d8 wind damage and 2 ranks of bleeding on a failed save or half as much and no further effects on a success.
Chain 2: Creatures who fail their saving throw are thrown to the end of this jutsu’s range, knocked prone and are Dazed.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

entries.name: FLYING SWALLOW: PENULTIMATE
entries.body:
FLYING SWALLOW: PENULTIMATE
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: B-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Weapon Range
Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Dual Wield), M
Cost: 14 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain, Clash
Description: You perform a swift series of powerful and accurate strikes with both weapons. Before finishing by striking with both weapons simultaneously.
Make two melee Taijutsu attacks, with either weapon, dealing your [Weapons Damage] + 1d10. If both attacks were successful, you attack one additional time dealing 3d10.
Chain 2: Affected creature(s) must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining a rank of Bruised for each successful attack on a failed save or half as many on a successful save.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage of the initial two attacks by 1d10.
NOBUNAGA’S RAGE
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: B-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Self (15-Foot Radius)
Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any), M Cost: 10 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain Description: Your eyes glaze over with a wrathful roar. All hostile creatures within range must make a Wisdom saving throw to avoid being taunted by your aggressive demeaner. On a failed save, until the end of their next turn, they must target you with their offensive attacks of jutsu.
Chain 2: A creature who fails their saving throw is also Demoralized.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the radius by +5 feet.

entries.name: SILENT KILLING
entries.body:
SILENT KILLING
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: B-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Touch Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any), M Cost: 12 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: As a part of the requirement for activating this jutsu, you must be Hidden from or Unseen by the target. You sneak towards them and strike from an unseen position at their most vital points.
Make a Taijutsu Attack, with a +2 bonus to its critical threat range, dealing [Weapons Damage] + 4d12 and you can immediately attempt to Hide again.
Chain 2: You gain advantage on checks made to Hide.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the critical threat bonus by +1.

entries.name: SUICIDE BOMBING
entries.body:
SUICIDE BOMBING
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: B-Rank Casting Time: 1 Reaction, which you take when someone else takes any action. Range: Self (30-feet radius) Duration: Instant
Components: NT (Paper bombs), M Cost: 10 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You open your clothing revealing a series of paper bombs all rigged to explode. You have enough time to speak a few more words before they all ignite and explode. All creatures within 30 feet of you must make a Dexterity saving throw at disadvantage. You automatically fail this save. On a failed save, you deal 14d6 fire damage, or half as much on a failure.

entries.name: TWIN RISING DRAGONS
entries.body:
TWIN RISING DRAGONS
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: B-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: 60 feet Duration: Concentration, up to 1 Minute,
Components: NT (Weapon Scrolls), M Cost: 10 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You grasp two of the scrolls with throwing weapons sealed into them and unleash them in a double helix formation. As you leap, the scrolls create a field of thin but strong wires, allowing for you to float 30 feet above the ground, remaining airborne between them.
For the duration, as an action, you can make up to 3 ranged Taijutsu attacks, dealing 5d6 Bludgeoning, Piercing or Slashing damage (your choice).
Chain 2: Once per turn, affected creatures must make a Constitution saving throw gaining a condition on a failed save based on the damage type dealt;
Bludgeoning: Bruised,
Piercing: Weakened,
Slashing: Lacerated
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank you can increase the number of attacks you can make with this jutsu by +1.
A-RANK:

entries.name: BREATH OF MOON: CATASTROPHE
entries.body:
BREATH OF MOON: CATASTROPHE
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: A-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Self (30-foot cone)
Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Melee), M Cost: 18 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Clash, Chain Description: You collect and manifest a dark chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon, curving it like a crescent moon. Each swing creates distortions in the area, devastating the terrain and manifesting waves of force capable of obliterating everything in its path.
All creatures in a 30-foot-cone, originating from you, must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 5d12 slashing damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success.
Chain 2: Creatures who fail their saving throw gain 2 ranks of Lacerated;
Chain 3: Until the end of your next turn, you can cast a Breath of Moon Bukijutsu using either your Action, Bonus Action or Reaction, ignoring its listed casting time.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d12.

entries.name: BREATH OF MOON: LOATHSOME
entries.body:
BREATH OF MOON: LOATHSOME
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: A-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: 60 feet
Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Melee), M Cost: 18 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain Description: You collect and manifest a dark chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon, curving it like a crescent moon. Each swing creates distortions, devastating the terrain and manifesting waves of force. You swing your weapon twice with such ferocity, that the space around you distorts removing the distance between you and another creature.
Select a creature you can see within range as you cut through the distance, teleporting to a space adjacent to the target that can hold you. Make two melee Taijutsu attacks, dealing your [Weapons Damage] + 2d12.
Chain 2: Damage this jutsu deals cannot be reacted to.
Chain 3: Until the end of your next turn, you can cast a Breath of Moon Bukijutsu using either your Action, Bonus Action or Reaction, ignoring its listed casting time.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d12.

entries.name: BREATH OF MOON: MOONGAZING
entries.body:
BREATH OF MOON: MOONGAZING
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: A-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Reaction, which you take when you would take damage.
Range: Weapons Range
Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Melee), M Cost: 18 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You collect and manifest a dark chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon, curving it like a crescent moon
You swing your weapon in the shape of a crescent moon with the intent of deflecting some of the incoming damage. Roll your [Weapons Damage] + 3d12, recording the result. Until the end of the current turn, you manifest a wall of force generated purely by the distortions your swings make. This wall of force has a number of hit points equal to the result and intercepts all damage.
Chain 2: If this wall of force would intercept a melee attack, the triggering creature takes slashing damage equal to the walls hit points.
Chain 3: When this wall is broken all creatures excluding you, within 10 feet of you takes slashing damage equal to the recorded result.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the walls hit points by 1d12.

entries.name: CHASING FANG
entries.body:
CHASING FANG
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: A-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Movement Speed Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Thrown & Any Melee), M Cost: 15 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You first launch a fist full of throwing weapons towards a target to break their focus. Make a ranged Taijutsu attack. On a hit, you deal your thrown [Weapons Damage] + 2d10, which is then follow up with a Powerful Swing.
Then move into a space within range, adjacent to the original target creature. Make a melee Taijutsu attack, dealing your [Weapons Damage] + 2d10.
Chain 2: Creatures hit by the ranged attack must make a Constitution saving throw, having their guard broken, reducing their DR by 6 until the end of the current turn.
Chain 3: Creatures hit by the melee attack must make a Constitution saving throw, being Staggered on a failed save.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d10.

entries.name: CRESCENT MOON DANCE
entries.body:
CRESCENT MOON DANCE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: A-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Movement Speed. Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Melee Weapon), M Cost: 18 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You move with such speed you create 2 additional afterimages that move separately from you. Make 3 melee Taijutsu attacks against a single target dealing your [Weapons Damage] +2d8.
Chain 2: Your afterimages remain as you swiftly bounce between locations. Until the end of your next turn, the next creature that target you, must roll a d20. On a roll of 11 or more, they target your afterimage, causing the attack or effect to miss entirely.
Chain 3: Until the end of your next turn, when you take the Attack Action, you can make two additional attacks as part of that action as your afterimages attack alongside you.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

entries.name: FATAL BLOW
entries.body:
FATAL BLOW
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: A-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapons Range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any), M Cost: 18 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: As a part of casting this jutsu, your target must be prone, restrained or incapacitated.
Your target is unable to defend themselves as you strike them down with a fatal blow. The target creature must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking your [Weapons Damage] + 8d10 and triggering all Elemental and Physical conditions that deal damage at once on a failed save. On a success, the target completely avoids your weapon as they move narrowly out of the way.
Chain 2: This jutsu can be cast when targeting a non-prone, restrained or incapacitated creature, but they make their save with advantage.
Chain 3: A creature who fails their save is Stunned until the end of their next turn.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

your target is unable to defend themselves as you strike them down with a fatal blow. the target creature must make a dexterity saving throw, taking your [weapons damage] + 8d10 and triggering all elemental and physical conditions that deal damage at once on a failed save. on a success, the target completely avoids your weapon as they move narrowly out of the way.
chain 2: this jutsu can be cast when targeting a non-prone, restrained or incapacitated creature, but they make their save with advantage.
chain 3: a creature who fails their save is stunned until the end of their next turn.
at higher ranks: for each rank you cast this jutsu above a-rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10. bukijutsu

entries.name: SAKURA TWISTER
entries.body:
SAKURA TWISTER
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: A-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapon Range Duration: Instant
Components: CM, W (Any Melee), M Cost: 17 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You grip your weapon, crouch down and do a slight dash forward, twisting your entire body to execute a devastating slash. Make a melee Taijutsu attack, dealing your [Weapons Damage] + 10d8 and the target must make a Constitution saving throw, becoming Prone and Staggered on a failed save.
Chain 2: On a successful hit, you bounce back, moving into a space of your choice within 20 feet and gain the benefits of the Dodge action.
Chain 3: This attack is made against all creatures within the weapons range AC, applying its effects on a hit.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

entries.name: SHADOW RUSH
entries.body:
SHADOW RUSH
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: A-Rank Casting Time: 1 Bonus Action Range: Movement Speed Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Melee), M, CM Cost: 18 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You cloak yourself in a dark aura meant to accelerate your movement. You make a Dash towards your target creature in range, attempting to stab them first as you impact them then using their body as a Launch pad, jumping into the air directly after.
First, move up to 60 feet in any direction towards a creature you can see within range, ending your movement within 5 feet of them. Next, make a melee Taijutsu attack against the target creature, on a hit the target takes your weapons damage + 4d4. Target creature must make a constitution save to resist allowing you to leap off of their body. On a failed save, you leap half your movement speed into the air. You are able to as a part of this action, cast a bukijutsu with the Finisher keyword.
S-RANK:

entries.name: BREATH OF SUN: FAKE RAINBOW
entries.body:
BREATH OF SUN: FAKE RAINBOW
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: S-Rank Casting Time: 1 Reaction, which you take when targeted by an attack. Range: Self Duration: 1 Round
Components: W (Any), M Cost: Special (25 Chakra) Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You begin to collect and manifest a bright chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon, causing it to shine, like the rising sun. This chakra then begins to glow brightly with enough intensity to nullify any chakra based or natural darkness until the end of your current turn. This shine creates a hazy illusion of all movement you make.
Until the beginning of your next turn, creatures cannot add their proficiency bonus to attacks made against you as they lose the motivation to follow through with the attack instinctually.
Additionally, until the end of your next turn, you can target one affected creature with a Bukijutsu Finisher regardless of range, once per turn, using either an Action or Bonus action, ignoring its listed casting time.

entries.name: BREATH OF SUN: HEAT HAZE
entries.body:
BREATH OF SUN: HEAT HAZE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: S-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapons Range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any), M Cost: Special (40 Chakra) Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You begin to collect and manifest a bright chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon, causing it to shine, like the rising sun. This chakra then begins to glow brightly with enough intensity to nullify any chakra based or natural darkness until the end of your current turn. This shine creates a hazy illusion of all movement you make.
This jutsu can only be cast as a Finisher, and must be cast targeting a creature whom you affected with a Bukijutsu with the Combo Keyword.
Make a melee weapon attack as quickly or slowly as you like. Regardless of the result of the attack, you automatically hit. You can roll to hit and declare the attack a hit or a miss, and the target can choose to react accordingly as they normally would, but regardless of the result or any penalties they impose or bonuses they gain, you automatically hit, dealing your weapons damage + 15d12. This jutsu cannot gain the benefits of a critical hit, damage dice multiplication or alteration effects. This jutsu cannot benefit from bonuses to damage as a result of other jutsu, class or clan features.

entries.name: BREATH OF SUN: RAGING SUN
entries.body:
BREATH OF SUN: RAGING SUN
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: S-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapons Range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any), M Cost: Special (30 Chakra) Keywords: Bukijutsu, Kinjutsu Description: You begin to collect and manifest a bright chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon, causing it to shine, like the rising sun. This chakra then begins to glow brightly with enough intensity to nullify any chakra based or natural darkness until the end of your current turn. This shine creates a hazy illusion of all movement you make.
Make two melee Taijutsu attacks with reverence behind each swing. On a successful hit, you deal your weapons damage + 10d8.
On a miss, you instead gain a +5 bonus to your AC until the beginning of your next turn. This bonus does not stack with itself.

entries.name: LIVING FORCE
entries.body:
LIVING FORCE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: S-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: 5 Feet Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Melee), M, CM, Cost: 22 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You draw upon negative emotions allowing it to leak out and coalesce with your chakra turning it into strength. You make a single devastating swing with your weapon, with enough force to collapse the ground, and ignite the air ablaze around you.
Make a melee Taijutsu attack, dealing your weapons damage + 7d12 fire damage. Creatures within 15 feet of you must make a dexterity saving throw, taking the damage dealt on a failed save or half as much on a success.

entries.name: SKY SPLITTER
entries.body:
SKY SPLITTER
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: S-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: 100 Feet Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Melee), M, CM Cost: 30 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You make a single swing with enough force to split to sky and the earth from the weight of your attack alone. All creatures in a 100-foot long, 15 feet wide line, originating from you, must make a dexterity saving throw taking 25d10 of your weapons damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful save. The ground tears open and leaves a 50-foot-deep crevasse from this bukijutsu. Creatures who are more than 5 feet from the edge of either crevasse must make a Dexterity saving throw or fall the full distance to the bottom.
jutsu, regain health equal to the amount of damage dealt with this jutsu.
