entries.name: THE ZONE
entries.body:
THE ZONE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: S-Rank Casting Time: 1 Full turn action Range: Self Duration: Concentration, up to 1 minute
Components: CM, W (Any), M Cost: 30 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Kinjutsu Description: Your mind and body enter a state of clarity that can only be achieved through dedicated training and skill. As a part of the activation of this jutsu you cannot maintain concentration on any other jutsu for the duration. You gain the following benefits;
Your Weapon and Taijutsu attack can't be reacted to, and treat damage immunity as resistance and ignore resistance.
Your movement speed is doubled and your AC is increased by 2.
You have advantage on Weapon and Taijutsu attack rolls and increase your Bukijutsu save DC by +1
You cannot lose concentration on this jutsu as a result of failing a concentration check.
You can end this jutsu early as a bonus action, and you may reactivate it as a bonus action, spending half of the initial cost. Once this jutsu ends you cannot use this jutsu again until you finish a full rest.

Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: S-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Self
Duration: Concentration, up to 1 Minute
Components: W (Any Melee Weapon), M Cost: 20 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You take a Powerful stance with no openings for attack. After activating this jutsu, attacks against you allows you to use a bukijutsu with the casting time of 1 action, as a reaction.
BLADE
Blade techniques utilize bladed weapons. Jutsu that focus on the use of bladed weapons such as swords, daggers, and claws. These jutsu often enhance the cutting power, range, or speed of the blade, allowing for devastating attacks.

entries.name: 1-STRIKE SLASH
entries.body:
1-STRIKE SLASH
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapon Range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Blade), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain Description: You perform a wide arcing slash with your weapon, slicing into them with little wasted movement.
Make a melee Taijutsu attack using your weapon, dealing your [Weapons Damage] + 3d6. On a hit, the target must also make a Constitution saving throw gaining 1 rank of Bleeding on a failed save.
Chain 1: If your attack misses, you can attempt to remake the attack, but against a different creature in range.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

entries.name: 1080 PSI AIR CANNON (KING)
entries.body:
1080 PSI AIR CANNON (KING)
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: C-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: 60 feet Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Blade), M Cost: 7 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain, Clash Description: You use the air itself to slash an enemy at a distance. You swing your blade and launch a compressed cross slash of air spiraling forward. Make a ranged Taijutsu attack, targeting a creature within range. On a hit, you deal your [Weapons Damage] + 2d6.
Chain 1: Affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining a rank of Bleed on a failed save.
Chain 2: Affected creature makes their concentration check at disadvantage and must make a Constitution saving throw, becoming Bruised on a failed save.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank this jutsu is cast above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6.

entries.name: CRESCENT MOON BEHEADING
entries.body:
CRESCENT MOON BEHEADING
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: C-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapons Range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Blade), M Cost: 9 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain Description: You switch your weapon into a two-handed grip to the best of your abilities. You attack with your weapon with the ferocity to behead your enemy. Make a single melee Taijutsu attack dealing your [Weapons Damage] + 4d10 and the affected creature must make a Dexterity saving throw, on a failed save, you must roll 4d20. If you rolled four 20’s, you immediately kill them as they are beheaded.
Chain 1: You instead only need three 20’s to behead the target and you can reroll 1 of the rolled d20 of your choice, once.
Chain 2: If the affected creature has ranks of Bleed, for each rank, you can add one d4 to a single d20 rolled (up to a max of 5), adding it to the result of the d20, treating results of 20 or higher, as a 20.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and Damage by 1d10 or the number of d20’s rolled by 1.

entries.name: DISARMING RIPOSTE
entries.body:
DISARMING RIPOSTE
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: C-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Reaction, which you take when you would take damage from a melee attack.
Range: Weapons Range
Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Blade), M
Cost: 7 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu
Description: You use your weapon to get around your opponent’s guard as they attack, and then bring it up in an attempt to disarm them, literally. You increase your ac by +4. If the triggering attack misses, you can make a melee Taijutsu attack. On a hit you deal your [Weapons Damage] + 3d8 and the triggering creature must make a Strength Saving throw. On a failed save, you disarm them of their weapon and take hold of it in an open hand. If you do not have a hand free, you throw it 10 feet in a direction of your choice.
Chain 1: This can be used against a ranged attack as well, where if the triggering attack misses, you can make a ranged Taijutsu attack, and throw their attack back at them, making the triggering creature the new target for the jutsu’s attack and effects.
Chain 2: A creature who has their weapon disarmed from them is also knocked prone.

entries.name: FALLING BLADE
entries.body:
FALLING BLADE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: C-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: 5 Feet Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Blade), M Cost: 8 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain Description: You perform a single Powerful downward slash that slices through just about everything in your path. Make a melee Taijutsu attack. On a hit, you deal your [Weapons Damage] + 3d10 and the affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining 2 of Bleed on a failed save.
Chain 1: On a failed save, they instead gain 1 rank of Lacerated in place of the ranks of Bleed.
Chain 2: If the affected creature has ranks of a Mental condition, you make the attack with a +2 bonus to hit.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and Damage by 1d10.

entries.name: HEAVEN CUTTER
entries.body:
HEAVEN CUTTER
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: C-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: 15 Feet (5-Foot wide, 10-foot-high cylinder) Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Blade), M Cost: 8 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain Description: You swipe your weapon upwards with enough force to create an updraft. Select a point you can see within 15 feet of you as your weapon swipe manifests cylinder of force, 5 foot wide, and 10-feet high.
Creatures in this cylinder must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save, they are thrown upwards to the top of the cylinder. At the end of the current turn affected creatures and objects fall to the ground taking 2d6 bludgeoning damage and land prone.
Chain 1: Affected creatures are instead thrown 20 feet in a direction of your choice (excluding up) at the end of the turn.
Chain 2: An allied creature who has a Taijutsu with the Finisher keyword, may cast it as a reaction, ignoring its normal casting time, gaining its Finisher effects.

entries.name: REAPERS SWING
entries.body:
REAPERS SWING
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: C-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Weapons Range
Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Blade), M Cost: 9 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain, Clash Description: As a requirement to activate this jutsu, you must be targeting a creature who is either; Grappled, Prone, Restrained, Stunned, or Unconscious.
You swing your blade with such ferocity that the air and other materials or objects in its path doesn’t recognize that it’s been slashed.
Make a melee Taijutsu attack with a +1 bonus to its attacks critical threat range, dealing your weapons damage + 6d6.
Chain 1: Affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining a rank of Lacerated on a failed save.
Chain 2: On a critical hit, you can make an additional attack targeting a different creature.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

entries.name: SERRATION WAVE
entries.body:
SERRATION WAVE
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: C-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: 20-Foot Cone
Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Blade), M
Cost: 7 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain
Description: You swing your weapon in a wide arc meant to impede movement and lockdown your enemies. All creatures in a 20-foot cone originating from you must make a Dexterity Saving Throw. On a failed save they take your weapon’s damage+1d10 and lose 10-feet of their movement speed until the end of their next turn. On a success they take half damage and do not suffer any additional effects.
Chain 1: An affected creature who is within difficult terrain makes their save at disadvantage.
Chain 2: An affected creature who fails their saving throw is also knocked prone.
At Higher Ranks: for every rank above C-rank this jutsu is cast, increase the chakra cost by 3 and damage by 1d10

entries.name: SHOCKWAVE SLASH
entries.body:
SHOCKWAVE SLASH
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: C-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Self (30-foot line) Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Blade), CM Cost: 8 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain, Clash Description: You coat the ends of your weapon in chakra before swinging and creating a crescent shaped wave of sharp chakra that cuts through all enemies in its path.
Targets in a 30-foot line that’s 5-feet wide must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking your [Weapons Damage] + 2d4 and be pushed to the end of the line into a space that can hold it on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.
Chain 1: A creature who fails their saving throw is disarmed and knocked prone.
Chain 2: A creature with ranks of an Elemental condition makes this save with a -2 penalty.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and Damage by 2d4.

entries.name: SWORD AURA: PRIMARY
entries.body:
SWORD AURA: PRIMARY
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: C-Rank Casting Time: 1 Bonus Action Range: Self Duration: Concentration, 1 Minute Components: W (Any Blade), M Cost: 8 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You begin to focus on the ability to create a Sword Aura. You send a controlled flood of chakra into your sword, the striking portion flaring a color of your choice. For the duration, your weapon ignores 4 DR (damage reduction). You cannot lose concentration of this jutsu as a result of damage.
Red. Your weapons damage type becomes fire, and a creature who fails a saving throw as a result of a Bukijutsu you cast, falls prone from its explosive force.
Blue. Your weapons damage type becomes cold, and a creature that fails a saving throw as a result of a Bukijutsu you cast, reduces their speed by 10 feet, until the end of your next turn.
Yellow. Your weapons damage type becomes lightning, deals double damage to constructures, and when a creature fails a saving throw as a result of a Bukijutsu you cast, they lose concentration on the lowest rank jutsu they are maintaining. If they are maintaining concentration on more than one jutsu of the same rank, they lose concentration on one at random.
B-RANK:

entries.name: AMPUTATION PUNISHMENT
entries.body:
AMPUTATION PUNISHMENT
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: B-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapons Range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Chained Hand Scythe, Hand Scythe, Scythe), M Cost: 12 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You leap over your opponent while hooking your blade being an enemy’s limbs and pulling violently to sever them. Make a melee Taijutsu attack, dealing your weapons damage + 4d8 and the target must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save the target loses mobility and function in one of their arms being unable to hold things, form hand seals or manipulate objects with it until they complete a rest.
A jutsu that removes conditions, cast at C-Rank or Higher can heal the targets arm(s), granting it mobility and function.
If a creature has both arms disabled by this jutsu, and would have an arm disabled for the second time, they make a constitution saving throw. On a failed save, one of their arms is amputated.

entries.name: BLADE HEART
entries.body:
BLADE HEART
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: B-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Self
Duration: Concentration, up to 1 minute
Components: W (Blade Group), M Cost: 11 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: As a requirement to activate this jutsu, you must have a weapon from the Blade weapon group equipped.
Your heart and your blade become one. As a bonus action on your turn or as a reaction to taking damage, you can assume your parrying stance until the beginning of your next turn gaining its benefits. While in this Parrying stance, you gain a +2 bonus to your AC and Dexterity saving throws. If you are disarmed this jutsu immediately end.
Additionally, when you score a critical hit using your weapon with a weapon or Taijutsu attack, the target gains 1 rank of lacerated.

entries.name: BLADE OF SIN: PRIDE
entries.body:
BLADE OF SIN: PRIDE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: B-Rank Casting Time: 1 reaction when you take damage from a melee attack Range: Weapon range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Blade), M Cost: 12 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain X Description: You seek to emulate the power of one of the Seven Deadly Sins of Humanity in your blade, imbuing the Sin of Pride inside the edge. When a creature would damage you with a melee attack, roll your weapons damage+4d8 and reduce the damage by the rolled amount. If you reduce the damage to 0, the target creature must make a Charisma Saving throw or become Demoralized until the end of the current turn.
At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage reduction by 2d8. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank, the triggering creature makes their save at disadvantage. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, all hostile creatures within 30 feet instead must make the save and the Demoralized last until the end of your next turn.

Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: B-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Self
Duration: Concentration, up to 1 minute.

entries.name: ICHIMONJI
entries.body:
ICHIMONJI
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: B-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: 5 Feet Duration: Instant
Components: W (Melee Slashing), M Cost: 14 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Clash Description: You take a solid striking form and perform 2 powerful slashes with enough force to leave a gash in the ground below the blade. The first slash is downward creating the gash in the ground, the second slash is upward creating a high-pitched singing sensation from the edge of the blade. Make two melee Taijutsu attacks against a single creature dealing your weapons damage + 4d6 with each hit.
If you successfully hit a creature with both attacks, you tear open their guard removing any chance they could defend themselves from you. A creature who is hit by both attacks, cannot gain the benefit of bonuses to AC or Temporary hit points as a result of Armor, Jutsu, features or traits against you until the end of your next turn.

ichimonji bukijutsu  ichimonji
classification: bukijutsu rank: b-rank casting time: 1 action range: 5 feet duration: instant
components: w (melee slashing), m cost: 14 chakra keywords: bukijutsu, clash description: you take a solid striking form and perform 2 powerful slashes with enough force to leave a gash in the ground below the blade. the first slash is downward creating the gash in the ground, the second slash is upward creating a high-pitched singing sensation from the edge of the blade. make two melee taijutsu attacks against a single creature dealing your weapons damage + 4d6 with each hit.
if you successfully hit a creature with both attacks, you tear open their guard removing any chance they could defend themselves from you. a creature who is hit by both attacks, cannot gain the benefit of bonuses to ac or temporary hit points as a result of armor, jutsu, features or traits against you until the end of your next turn. bukijutsu clash

entries.name: JUDGEMENT CUT
entries.body:
JUDGEMENT CUT
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: B-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: 30 feet
Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Melee Slashing), M
Cost: 12 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu, Clash
Description: You take your weapon and coat it in your chakra, and use your raw skill to gauge the distance between yourself and your target.
Select a space you can see within range. All creatures within 5 feet of this space must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a target takes 5d8 Slashing damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success.
Additionally, you can choose to spend an additional 6 Chakra to use this jutsu again targeting the same space, forcing all creatures to repeat the saving throw. You can do this twice per casting.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of spaces you can select by +1. A creature can only be affected by one instance this jutsu at a time.

entries.name: QUICK DRAW
entries.body:
QUICK DRAW
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: B-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapons Range
Duration: Instant
Components: W (Melee Slashing), W Cost: 14 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You take a withdrawn stance gripping your weapon and prepare for a powerful sweeping strike. You spend your turn preparing this attack until the beginning of your next turn. You cannot take a Bonus action the turn you use this jutsu or a reaction after using this jutsu. At the start of your next turn, you swing with all of your force, all creatures in front of you within 5 feet, must make a Dexterity saving throw at disadvantage, taking 6d12 damage.

entries.name: THREE THOUSAND WORLDS
entries.body:
THREE THOUSAND WORLDS
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: B-Rank Casting Time: 1 action Range: Weapons Range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Blade), M Cost: 5 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain, Clash Description: You integrate all your power and chakra into your sword, lacing it with enough chakra to cut any and everything that stands before you. If this jutsu is cast targeting a creature who is gaining the benefit of the Dodge action, you do not make the attack at disadvantage. If this jutsu is cast targeting a creature who is gaining the benefits of Temporary hit points, Damage Reduction or Resistance, you ignore them for this attack and damage roll. Make a melee Taijutsu attack dealing your weapon damage + 8d6 and on a hit the target creature makes a Constitution Saving Throw, gaining 1 rank of Lacerated.
At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d6.
A-RANK:

entries.name: BLADE OF SIN: ENVY
entries.body:
BLADE OF SIN: ENVY
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: A-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapon range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Blade), M Cost: 12 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain Description: You seek to emulate the power of one of the Seven Deadly Sins of Humanity in your blade, imbuing the Sin of Envy inside the edge. Make a Melee Taijutsu attack against a creature in range. On a hit you deal your Weapons Damage+7d8 and if the target creature is gaining any type of positive buff from a jutsu, feature or trait they must make a Constitution Saving Throw. On a failed save the benefits they receive from the buff are halved and you gain half of the benefits until the end of the start of your next turn.
At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 2d8.

entries.name: BLISTERING EDGE
entries.body:
BLISTERING EDGE
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: A-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Self
Duration: Concentration (1 Minute) Components: W (Any Melee Slashing) M
Cost: 16 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu
Description: For the duration you sharpen the edge of your blade so that when you swing your blade with high speed it ignites the air, burning the edge of the blade from friction alone. Twice per turn for the duration you can convert your weapons damage into fire damage and force a creature who takes weapons damage to make a Constitution Saving throw or gain a rank of Burned.

entries.name: KILLER BEE
entries.body:
KILLER BEE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: A-Rank Casting Time: 1 Full Turn Action Range: Self
Duration: Concentration, up to 1 minute.
Components: W (x5 Tanto), M Cost: 20 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You hold 5 of your weapons in the gaps between your armpits, the hinge joints of your arms and legs, and various other places; before placing a final Tanto in your mouth, leaving your hands completely free. This jutsu allows for quick and unpredictable attacks, that catch your enemies off-guard. While under the effects of this jutsu, you cannot concentrate on any other jutsu.
This jutsu provides you the following benefits;
Melee weapon attacks you make cannot be reacted to.
As a reaction you can deflect an attack against you, adding +5 to your AC against the triggering attack. If this would cause the attack to miss, you can make a melee weapon attack as a part of the same reaction, as long as the target is within range.
As a bonus action, you can make 2 melee weapon attacks.
As an action you can take the dash action and make 3 melee weapon attacks.
As a full turn action, you make use of all of your weapons and strike with them. Make five melee weapon attacks, once with each weapon. If they all hit, the creature is stunned until the end of their next turn.
All of these benefits are only applicable while using Tanto. Switching to a different weapon or even holding a weapon that is not a Tanto will automatically end this jutsu.

entries.name: SWORD AURA: BLUE
entries.body:
SWORD AURA: BLUE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: A-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Self (60-foot line) or Movement Speed Duration: Instant Components: W (Any Blade), M Cost: 16 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You must be under the effects of a Sword Aura to cast this jutsu. You use the built-up chakra in your blade to have it explode out in a shining blue slash as your slash, striking all who stand before you. You can either cast Arrow or Break.
Arrow: All creatures within a 10-foot wide and 60-foot line your weapons reach must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking your weapons damage+6d8 on a failed save and gaining 1 rank of bleeding. On a success they instead take half damage
Break: Select a Target creature in your Full movement speed. You dash to them and slash with your weapon. Make a Melee Taijutsu attack, dealing your weapons damage 5d10 on a hit and causing 3 ranks of bleeding.
At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, you can instead cast Cross, which lets you cast both. Select a target in range and cast Break, and all creatures in between you and the target are targeted by Arrow.
S-RANK:

entries.name: BLACK BLADE
entries.body:
BLACK BLADE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: S-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: 120 feet Duration: Instant Components: W (Any Blade), M, CM Cost: 28 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Fuinjutsu Description: As part of the requirements for casting this jutsu, your weapon must be under the effects of a jutsu that would provide it an increase to damage in any way, such as the jutsu Lightning Release: Static Weapon, Mortal Draw, Fire Release: Flame Coat, etc.
You take your already enhanced weapon and funnel more powerful chakra within it, causing it to radiate intense black chakra. You move to a space within 120 feet in any path of your choosing, jumping every 30 feet and striking with your weapon in the air, sending a slash of black chakra in a 45-foot long, 15-foot-wide line. All creatures within range must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking your weapon's damage + 2d8 damage of the damage type of the jutsu that buffs your damage (This jutsu ignores restrictions that prevent the damage of your jutsu from applying the damage rolls of this jutsu multiple times) on a failed save, or half much damage on a success.
A creature that fails this saving throw by 5 or more lowers their maximum hit points by half the damage dealt for the next minute. This effect can be removed early by a medical effect that removes conditions of S-Rank or higher. If this occurs, the effected creature cannot suffer the fall by 5 or more effect of this jutsu for the next minute.

entries.name: SPIRAL CLOUD PASSAGE
entries.body:
SPIRAL CLOUD PASSAGE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: S-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Self (25 feet) Duration: Instant
Components: W (Melee Slashing), M Cost: 25 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You leap into the air while slashing relentlessly, Striking everyone and everything around your multiple times. Make 3 melee Taijutsu attacks. All creatures within 25-feet of you of your choice are targets. The result of the 3 attacks represents the rolls made in attempts to get over each creature's AC. On each successful hit, target creature(s) takes your weapons damage + 5d10 Slashing Damage. If you roll a critical hit all creatures suffer the effects of the critical hit. You do not add your ability modifier to the damage.

entries.name: SWORD AURA: VIOLET
entries.body:
SWORD AURA: VIOLET
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: S-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Self (60-foot radius Sphere) Duration: Instant Components: W (Any Blade), M Cost: 24 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain Description: You must be under the effects of a Sword Aura to cast this jutsu. You use the built-up chakra in your blade to have it explode out in a violent violet explosion as you slash down, raining your sword aura over a wide area, striking all who stand before you. All creatures of your choice within the area of this jutsu must make a Dexterity Saving Throw or take your weapons damage +11d6 and gain 3 ranks of Lacerated as you rain down violet swords made of your sword aura. On a success they take half damage and instead gain 2 ranks of bleeding.
FLAIL
Flail techniques utilize weapons with long necks or whiplike structures. Jutsu that focus on the use of flexible weapons such as whips, chains, and kusarigama. These jutsu often enhance the range, maneuverability, or unpredictability of the weapon, allowing for tricky attacks and defenses that can ensnare or disarm opponents.
D-RANK:

entries.name: CHAIN PULL
entries.body:
CHAIN PULL
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapon Range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Flail), M Cost: 3 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain Description: You throw your weapon wrapping it around a target and pulling towards yourself. The target must succeed a Strength saving throw. On a failed save they become grappled by you. At the end of the affected creatures turns, they can make a Strength saving throw to end the grapple effect on a successful save.
Chain 1: You can target one additional creature in range.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the range of this jutsu by +5 feet.

entries.name: CHAINED EMBRACE
entries.body:
CHAINED EMBRACE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapon Range Duration: 1 Round
Components: W (Any Flail), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain Description: You throw your weapon and pull back as it wraps around their arms, locking them into an unusable position.
The target must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failure target creature cannot make Hand Signs or hold weapons or items until the end of their next turn. Any weapons or items they are holding is dropped in their space.
Chain 1: A creature who failed their save is also knocked prone.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target by +1.

TOADS WHIPPING TONGUE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 bonus action Range: Self Duration: Concentration, up to 1 minute
Components: W (Any Flail), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: This jutsu does not cost chakra to maintain concentration on it. You enhance your weapon with chakra to extend its reach. For the duration, all Flail Weapons gain an additional rank of Reach. They also gain a +2 bonus on Disarm, Grapple and Trip attempts if they have the associated weapon property.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If cast at B-Rank or higher, they gain an additional rank of Reach.

entries.name: WIRE TRAP
entries.body:
WIRE TRAP
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapons Range Duration: Special
Components: W (Any Flail), M Cost: 3 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You lay your weapons striking portion onto the ground leaving it in place. When you cast this jutsu, select a point within your weapons range. All spaces within 10 feet of this space are treated as the Trigger Range. You must remain within 15 feet of this select space, or this jutsu ends with no effect.
As a reaction on another creatures turn you can trigger this jutsu. All creatures within the Trigger Range must make a Dexterity saving throw. If their passive perception is lower than the DC, they make their save at disadvantage.
On a failed save they are grappled, knocked prone and pulled up to 10 feet into a space of your choice.
C-RANK:

entries.name: CHAIN KILL
entries.body:
CHAIN KILL
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: C-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapons range
Duration: instant
Components: W (Any Flail), M
Cost: 7 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chan
Description: You whip your weapon into a frenzy, ready to strike down your foes in rapid succession. Make a melee Taijutsu attack against an enemy within range. On a hit, you deal twice your [Weapon's Damage] on a hit.
If you reduce a creature to 0 hit points using this jutsu, you can move up to 10 feet, and make another attack against a creature of your choice within your weapons range, repeating this jutsu’s effect. You can make additional attacks in this way, no more than once per casting.
Chain 1: You don’t need to reduce a creature’s hit points to 0, to make an additional attack against a different creature.
Chain 2: Each time you reduce a creature(s) hit points to 0 with this jutsu, you regain 2 Chakra points.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of additional creatures you can attack by +1.

entries.name: DANCING FOOL TWISTER
entries.body:
DANCING FOOL TWISTER
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: C-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapons Range
Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Flail), M
Cost: 7 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain
Description: You whip your weapon with the strength to create a small twister at your command. All creatures in your weapon range in a sphere around you must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save, they take your [Weapons Damage+2d6] and are thrown 20-feet into a direction of your choice (excluding up) or half as much damage on a success and no further effect.
Chain 1: A creature who is thrown falls prone and suffers a 15-foot penalty to their speed until the end of their next turn.
Chain 2: A creature who fails their saving throw is instead thrown 30-feet and suffers a 15-foot penalty to their speed until the end of their next turn.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 1d6.
DANCING FOOL’S EMBRACE
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: C-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapons Range
Duration: Concentration, up to 1 minute.
Components: W (Any Flail), M
Cost: 6 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain
Description: You whip your weapon with the finesse to wrap around your enemies and bring them into a tight and lethal embrace. You do not need to spend chakra to maintain concentration of this jutsu.
Select a point you can see in your weapons ranged. All hostile creatures in a 5-foot radius of the chosen point must make a Strength Saving Throw. On a failed save, they have been bound in some way, as your weapon cuts and digs deep into them as they take your [Weapons Damage] or no damage of effect on a successful save.
A creature who failed their saving throw has your weapon still bound to them and cannot move further than your weapons range away from you for the duration. Additionally, you cannot use the weapon used to cast this jutsu for attacks or other jutsu.
As a Bonus action, while you have creature(s) bound by this jutsu, you can tighten the embrace, dealing 3d10 damage to all bound creatures using your weapons damage type.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage dealt as a bonus action by 1d10.

entries.name: IRON WEB DOME
entries.body:
IRON WEB DOME
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: C-Rank
Casting Time: 1 reaction to you or ally in range takes damage Range: Weapons Range (Radius Sphere)
Duration: instant
Components: W (Any Flail), M
Cost: 8 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain, Clash
Description: You whip your weapon around at high speeds, creating a dome to defend against attacks. You can set the radius of this doom up to your weapons range. The Dome has an AC equal to your Taijutsu Save DC and hit points equal to twice your weapons damage and intercepts all damage originating outside the dome. A creature who hits the dome with a melee attack and fails to break it takes damage equal to your [Weapon's Damage].
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the hit points of the dome by +4.
B-RANK:

entries.name: ABYSSAL AURA (KING)
entries.body:
ABYSSAL AURA (KING)
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: B-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Bonus Action
Range: Self (15-foot radius sphere) Duration: 1 Round
Components: W (Any Flail), M
Cost: 10 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu, Genjutsu
Description: You spin your weapon slowly as its slow grind draws anxiety from those around you eliciting different effects based on how far in a Chain you were in before casting. You must currently be in Chain 2 before casting this jutsu, which determines this Jutsu’s benefits when cast which last until the end of your next turn.
Chain 2: All creatures in range, must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save the next time they take damage from a flail weapon or Bukijutsu that uses a Flail they gain 2 ranks of Concussed.
At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3, and range by 5 feet.

entries.name: BLUE MOON (KING)
entries.body:
BLUE MOON (KING)
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: B-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Weapons Range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Flail), M
Cost: 12 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain
Description: You whip your weapon before channeling so much chakra into the end it looks like a blue moon at the end of your weapon. Make 2 Melee Taijutsu attacks against a creature in range dealing your weapons damage+1d12. If you are successful with both of these attacks, you can make a third attack dealing, 4d10 force damage.
Chain 2: Affected creature must make a Strength saving throw gaining 2 ranks of bruised on a failed save. becoming Dazzled on a failed save.
At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3, and the damage by 1d12.

entries.name: DEMONIC CULLING: EYE BASKET
entries.body:
DEMONIC CULLING: EYE BASKET
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: B-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Weapons Range (15-foot radius sphere)
Duration: Concentration, up to 1 minute
Components: W (Any Flail), M
Cost: 12 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu
Description: You spin your weapon with chakra and quickly surround your target within the spin. As it envelopes your target you tighten the circle around them, conforming into a sphere like pattern before sinking into them from above in a 15-foot radius around them. All creatures in range must succeed a Strength saving throw taking Weapons Damage+6d8 damage, becoming prone and restrained on a failed save, and only half damage with no conditions on a success. At the start of their turn, they may remake the save, ending the conditions on a success.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8

entries.name: EARTH SPIDER SEWING
entries.body:
EARTH SPIDER SEWING
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: B-Rank Casting Time: 10 Minutes Range: 60-foot cube Duration: 1 Hour
Components: W (Battle Wire), M Cost: 13 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You lace an area with razor sharp wires less than a foot above ground level. Trapping, damaging, and hindering all creatures who aren’t aware of them or their locations exactly. For the duration, select a space the size of a 60-foot cube to fill with razor sharp wires. Select creatures that you can see to be unaffected by this jutsu.
For the duration, creatures who enter the radius of this jutsu move as if the area this jutsu inhabits is difficult terrain.
Creatures who cast Jutsu with a Mobility (M) component, must make a Dexterity saving throw being restrained by the wires as they get wrapped up inside of them on a failed save.
Creatures who make weapon attacks must make a Strength saving throw, having their weapon caught on a wire and being unable to complete the attack on a failed save.

Make 5 Melee Taijutsu attacks against a creature in range rolling one damage roll, depending on how many of them hit
1 hit: weapons damage+6d4 damage.

5 hits: weapons damage+6d12 damage, 6 ranks of bleed, dazed and prone.
At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3, and the damage by 1dx.

RUPTURE GALE ORB
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: B-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Weapons Range Duration: Instant

Cost: 12 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain
Description: You whip your weapon into a sphere around you before you let it erupt out with a large burst. All creatures within your weapons range must make a Strength Saving throw. On a failure they are pulled within 5 feet of you. On a success they are only pulled up to 10 feet towards you. After, all creatures within 5 feet of you must make Constitution Saving throw as the small gale around you erupts, dealing your weapons damage+4d12 and being knocked prone.
At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3, and the damage by 1d6.

entries.name: STAMINA STRIKE
entries.body:
STAMINA STRIKE
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: B-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Weapons Range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Flail), M
Cost: 12 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain
Description: You whip your weapon before slamming it into the center of your enemy, looking to ruin their flow and stamina. Make a Melee Taijutsu attack against a creature in range, dealing your weapons damage+6d6 damage and the target creature must make a Constitution Saving Throw. If you crit this attack, the target creature automatically fails this save. On a failed save, the target creature becomes Dazed until the end of their next turn and loses an amount of chakra equal to the jutsu damage rolled as they involuntarily.
At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3, and the damage by 1d6.

entries.name: WIRE CRUCIFIXION
entries.body:
WIRE CRUCIFIXION
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: B-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: 90 Feet Duration: Instant
Components: W (Battle Wire), M Cost: 11 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: As a part of casting this jutsu, you must be in a forest, urban environment, or cavernous terrain.
You pull your wires, revealing threads already surrounding a target you can see within range.
Select two creatures within range. Both must make a Strength saving throw, being grappled, restrained, being unable to make hand seals and gaining 2 ranks of bleeding on a failed save. On the targets turn, they spend an action to make a Strength saving throw to break the wires, ending the grappled and restrained condition on themselves and also being able to make hand seals again.
A creature that ends its turn grappled and restrained by this jutsu gains an additional 2 ranks of bleed.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures affected by this jutsu by +1.
A-RANK:

entries.name: COLLATERAL DAMAGE
entries.body:
COLLATERAL DAMAGE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: A-rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapon Range Duration: instant. Components: M, W (Any Flail). Cost: 16 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu. Description: You angle the weighted end of your Flail behind you before shifting your weight forward while maneuvering the flail around your side, sending a devastating arc of force towards an opponent, looking to remove them from the battle field in one fell swoop. Make a Melee Taijutsu attack against a target within range, on hit the target takes your [Weapons Damage] + 7d10 and is sent flying up to a number of feet equal to 10 times your Taijutsu Modifier. If the enemy collides with another creature, that creature must make a Dexterity Saving thrown, on a failure both creatures take Fall damage equal to the amount of feet the primary target had remaining. On a success, the primary target still suffers the damage of the remaining distance, but the secondary target only takes half.
At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast above A-Rank, increase the cost by 3, and the knockback becomes 10 times double your Taijutsu ability mod.

entries.name: IRON GRASP
entries.body:
IRON GRASP
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: A-rank Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Weapon Range Duration: instant. Components: M, W (Any Flail). Cost: 16 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu. Description: You lash out with your chained weapon, aiming to debilitate and restrain a foe within reach before presenting them to your allies to be maimed.
Select a creature within range, make a contested grapple check where you use your weapon attack bonus in place of athletics, whichever is higher. If a creature becomes grappled by this jutsu, they take your [Weapons Damage] + 2d6 you immediately move them anywhere within your weapon range. For each Ally that they pass by, that ally may take a reaction to take an attack of opportunity or cast a Bukijutsu of Chain 2 or lower targeting the grappled creature. At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and allies may make two attacks of opportunity with one reaction, or cast a Bukijutsu of Chain 3 in place of chain 2

entries.name: IRON VANGUARD
entries.body:
IRON VANGUARD
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: A-rank Casting Time: 1 Reaction you take when you or an ally within range take damage
Range: Radius equal to weapons range
Duration: 1 Round
Components: M, W (Any Flail). Cost: 16 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu. Description: You whip your flail into the air, rotating it at breakneck speeds until you create an impenetrable barrier of steel and chain When you or an ally within range would be targeted by an attack or take damage you quickly leap into action by spinning your weapon in order to deflect and hamper incoming attacks. Allies gain +6 AC to the triggering attack, and +4 to AC for any other attacks they are subjected to while this jutsu persists, additionally, they reduce all incoming damage by your [Weapons Damage Die] twice a turn.

entries.name: WHIP LIKE STRIKES
entries.body:
WHIP LIKE STRIKES
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: A-rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapon Range Duration: instant. Components: M, W (Any Flail). Cost: 16 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu. Description: By levying the weight and tension brought on by the chain and the weapon your mastery over the flail allows you to change and react to the weapons path by flicking your wrist and altering its course in a dozen micro movements.
This Jutsu cannot score a critical hit. Select a creature within range and make 5 Melee Taijutsu attacks against them as your weapon strikes many times in the blink of an eye. Each hit deals your [Weapons Damage] + 1d6, depending on how many hits, the creature suffers varying effects.
[1 Strike]: The Creature loses 15 feet of movement for 1 minute
[2 Strikes]: All previous effects, and a rank of bruised for 1 minute
[3 Strikes]: All previous effects, The target loses 2 AC for 1 minute
[4 Strikes]: All previous effects, The target gains a ranked of Staggered for 1 minute
[5 Strikes]: All previous effects, The target gains 5 ranks of concussed for 1 minute
S-RANK:

entries.name: ANNIHILATION
entries.body:
ANNIHILATION
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: S-rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: 30 Foot Cone Duration: instant. Components: M, W (Any Flail). Cost: 24 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu. Description: You raise your weapon above your head, swinging it in mighty arcs over your head until the weapon becomes a blur of destructive force. As a part of activating this jutsu, you may move up to your movement speed, during your movement, you may unleash a 30-foot cone of destructive force up to 3 times, at which point this jutsu ends. Each creature inside one of the cones must make a Strength Saving Throw, on a failed save they are thrown back 20 feet and suffer [Weapons Damage] +9d12 and take a rank of concussed. Or only half as much damage, half as much knockback, and no ranks of concussed on a success. A creature can be affected by this Jutsu no more than twice.

entries.name: HEARTSTOPPER
entries.body:
HEARTSTOPPER
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: S-rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapons Range Duration: instant. Components: M, W (Any Flail). Cost: 24 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain Description: You hit them in the heart really hard, like directly in the heart. Make a Melee Taijutsu attack against a creature within range, On hit, the creature takes [Weapons Damage] +10d10, additionally, the target must make a Constitution Saving throw versus your Taijutsu save DC. On a failure, the creature takes a rank of Staggered and 3 ranks of weakened.
POLEARM
Blade techniques utilize bladed weapons. Jutsu that focus on the use of bladed weapons such as swords, daggers, and claws. These jutsu often enhance the cutting power, range, or speed of the blade, allowing for devastating attacks.

entries.name: 2-POINT PENETRATE
entries.body:
2-POINT PENETRATE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapon Range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Polearm), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain Description: You perform a double strike attacking at your opponent’s shoulders or legs in an attempt to destabilize them. Make two melee Taijutsu attacks dealing your [Weapons Damage].
Chain 1: If a target is hit at least once, it must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, they suffer a 10-foot speed penalty for each successful attack, until the end of their next turn.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

entries.name: ACHILLES HEEL
entries.body:
ACHILLES HEEL
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Bonus Action Range: 30 feet Duration: 1 Round
Components: W (Any Polearm), M Cost: 3 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You aim to hinder your enemy from harming your allies, so they instead target you. Select one creature you can see in range and take a combative stance meant to taunt them. Select creature gains disadvantage on attacks targeting creatures other than you until the end of their next turn.
This jutsu ends early when you would deal damage, force a save to a creature other than the target or would use this jutsu again on another creature.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, you can deal damage to or force other creatures to make saving throws without this jutsu ending on the original target, so long as they would also be affected by the damage or also forced to make the same save.

Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapon Range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Polearm), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain Description: You charge a thrusting attack before lashing at with precise timing to deal a lethal blow to your enemy. You can move up to 10-feet towards the target and make a melee Taijutsu Attack. On a hit, you deal your [Weapon Damage] +3d6.
Chain 1: On a hit, affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw, being Dazed on a failed save.
At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

entries.name: DRAGONFLY LANDING
entries.body:
DRAGONFLY LANDING
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 action Range: Weapons Range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Polearm), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: Your jump up and then stab down with numerous thrusts. Make a melee Taijutsu Attack against a target creature in range. On a hit you deal your [Weapon Damage] +2d10.
Chain 1: On a hit, affected creature must make a Strength saving throw, being knocked Prone on a failed save. You also land in their space. If they would attempt to stand while still sharing a space, you get an attack of opportunity.
At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d10.

entries.name: ENHANCED BLOCKING
entries.body:
ENHANCED BLOCKING
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Self Duration: Concentration, up to 1 minute
Components: W (Any Polearm), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You brace your weapon and enter a more guarded stance. You cannot lose concentration of this jutsu as a result of damage and do not need to spend chakra to maintain this jutsu.
For the duration, your Polearm type weapon gains the Blocking 2 weapon property. Additionally, you may add your Blocking property bonus to Strength or Dexterity saving throw you would make.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If you would cast this jutsu at B-Rank or higher, you can increase the ranks of Blocking by +1.

entries.name: HOLES OF DESPAIR
entries.body:
HOLES OF DESPAIR
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: D-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Weapon’s range
Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Polearm), M
Cost: 4 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain
Description: You thrust your weapon out from different angles as you seek to riddle your opponent with holes. Make two melee Taijutsu Attacks dealing your [Weapons Damage] on hit.
Chain 1: If you score at least one attack, affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining a rank of Bleeding on a failed save.
At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, you can increase the number of attacks you make by +1.

entries.name: IMPALER STAB
entries.body:
IMPALER STAB
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapon’s range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Polearm), M Cost: 5 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Description: You thrust your weapon into your enemy, and keep it there. Make a melee Taijutsu Attack. On a hit deal your [Weapon Damage] + 2d12. You then can choose to keep it impaled into the enemy. If you do, you cannot attack with that weapon or use it as part of other Bukijutsu.
A creature impaled by your weapon is grappled by you until they can escape. While they are grappled you can use your bonus action to twist the weapon, dealing 2d12 piercing damage.
A creature impaled by your weapon makes Strength saving throws at the end of each of their turns, to break the grapple. Alternatively, if they can escape your weapons range, they are no longer impaled by your weapon.
Chain 1: A creature impaled by your weapon cannot take reactions.
At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the initial and bonus action damage by 1d12.

entries.name: OFFENSIVE DODGE
entries.body:
OFFENSIVE DODGE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Reaction, Which you take when you take damage from an attack. Range: Self Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Polearm), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Description: You take a reverse grip on your weapon and attempt to strike before you are struck. You gain a +2 bonus to AC against the triggering attack and you can make a melee Taijutsu attack against the triggering creature. On a hit you deal your [Weapon Damage] + 2d8.
Chain 1: if you score a hit, you gain temporary hit points equal to the result of your weapons damage die.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the AC bonus to +3. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the AC bonus to +4.

entries.name: STONE FORM
entries.body:
STONE FORM
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Reaction, which you take when another creature in range is taking a Reaction.
Range: Weapons Range
Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Polearm), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: If a creature in your weapons range would take a reaction, before their effect is applied, make a melee Taijutsu attack. On a hit, you deal your [Weapons Damage] + 3d8 and the affected creature must make a Strength Saving throw. On a failed save, the triggering jutsu is interrupted and its effects are dispelled, but the chakra is still spent.
Chain 1: On a failed save the affected creature doubles the chakra spent.
At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 action Range: Weapons Range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Polearm), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain Description: You swing your polearm, flooded with chakra meant to break an enemy’s offensive posture. Make a Melee Taijutsu Attack, dealing your [Weapons Damage] + 3d6 on a hit and forcing them to make a Strength saving throw, gaining a rank of Weakened on a failed save.
Chain 1: On a failed save the affected creature increases the cost of the next jutsu they cast by +4 as you inject the built-up chakra into their chakra network.

entries.name: BOUNDING BLOSSOM
entries.body:
BOUNDING BLOSSOM
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: C-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action Range: 20 Feet
Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Polearm), M
Cost: 7 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain
Description: Select a point within 20 feet of you that you can see, as you leap into the air and strike down with the butt of your polearm, scattering your foes and leveling the ground.
You move to a space within 5 feet of the target point as you leap over and strike it. All creatures, excluding yourself, in a 15-feet radius centering on the chosen point, must make a Strength Saving Throw. On a failed save, they take 4d10 bludgeoning damage and are knocked prone on a failed save, and half as much and no further effects on a successful save.
Chain 1: You gain temporary hit points equal to your weapons damage until the beginning of your next turn.
Chain 2: Creatures withing 5 feet of the select point, makes their save at disadvantage.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d10. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank, creatures who fail also gain a rank of Weakened.

entries.name: COILING STRIKE
entries.body:
COILING STRIKE
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: C-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Bonus Action
Range: Weapons Range
Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Polearm), M
Cost: 7 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu
Description: You can only cast this jutsu, if the previous action you took this turn was casting a Bukijutsu that dealt damage to at least one creature.
Using the force from your previous attack, you coil around your weapon, compounding the force into another strike. You can move up to 10 feet into an unoccupied space you can see and make a melee Taijutsu attack against a creature in range, dealing your [Weapons Damage] + 2d6.
Chain 1: Affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining a rank of Bleed on a failed save.
Chain 2: The affected creature is pushed 10 feet away from you.

entries.name: CRESCENT MOON PENETRATION
entries.body:
CRESCENT MOON PENETRATION
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: C-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapon Range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Polearm), M Cost: 9 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You grip your weapon with two-hands to the best of your abilities. You attack with your weapon with the ferocity to pierce straight through their heart. Make a single melee Taijutsu attack dealing your [Weapons Damage] + 4d10 and the affected creature must make a Dexterity saving throw, on a failed save, you must roll 4d20. If you rolled four 20’s, you immediately kill them as you pierce straight through their heart.
Chain 1: You instead only need three 20’s to pierce the targets heart and you can reroll 1 of the rolled d20 of your choice, once.
Chain 2: If the affected creature has ranks of Weakened, for each rank, you can add one d4 to a single d20 rolled (up to a max of 5), adding it to the result of the d20, treating results of 20 or higher, as a 20.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and Damage by 1d10 or the number of d20’s rolled by 1.

entries.name: DRAUPNIR JAVELIN
entries.body:
DRAUPNIR JAVELIN
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: C-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: 30 feet
Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Polearm), M
Cost: 8 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu
Description: You trace the design of your polearm in chakra and create a shell of chakra over it. You then throw it towards a target in range. Make a Ranged Taijutsu attack, dealing [Weapons Damage] + 2d12 on a hit and they must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save they are rooted to the ground, becoming restrained, remaking the save at the start of their turns to end the condition.
Chain 1: As a reaction, you can call back your weapon.
Chain 2: If the target has ranks of an Elemental condition, the chakra shell surrounding it imitates that nature. Your weapon can deal an additional 1d6 of the associated conditions damage type when you deal [Weapon Damage] with it for the next minute, or until it is no longer held by you, whichever comes first.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and Damage by 1d12.

entries.name: HOLLOW SILHOUETTE
entries.body:
HOLLOW SILHOUETTE
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: C-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Bonus Action
Range: 30 feet
Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Polearm), M
Cost: 6 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu
Description: As you spin your weapon and move towards the target you sidestep back and forth quickly into their blind sides, leaving only an outline of you to see. Make a contested Stealth check against the target creature’s Perception. On a success you can immediately move to be within 5 feet of them and you gain advantage on the next attack roll you make against them this turn. On a failure you have disadvantage on the next attack roll against them this turn.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the range by 10 feet.

entries.name: MURDEROUS STABBING LINK
entries.body:
MURDEROUS STABBING LINK
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: C-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Self (30-Foot Line) Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Polearm) Cost: 8 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain, Clash Description: You perform a series of thrusts with your weapon with enough force to penetrate steel, sending powerful piercing shockwaves up to 30 feet in a straight line stopping at the first creature hit. All creatures in a 30-foot long, 5-foot-wide line, originating from you, must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save they take your [Weapons Damage] + 2d10 and becomes Dazed or half as much damage on a success and no further effects.
Chain 1: On a failed save, they are pushed 10 feet in the direction of the line created by this jutsu and falling prone.
Chain 2: On a failed save, affected creatures suffer a 20-foot speed penalty, until the end of their next turn.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10

entries.name: SPEAR ASSAULT
entries.body:
SPEAR ASSAULT
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: C-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Self (15-foot Cone)
Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Polearm), M
Cost: 8 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu
Description: You thrust out with your weapon while also making afterimages of the weapon while moving forward. All creatures in a 15-foot cone, originating from you must make a Dexterity saving throw.
On a failed save, they take [Weapons Damage] + 1d12 and have their DR reduced by 4, until the end of their next turn.
Chain 1: Increase the size of the cone by +5 Feet
Chain 2: After your assault, you spin your weapon, gaining temporary hit points equal to the highest damage dealt by this jutsu.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d12.
B-RANK:

entries.name: DUAL RING
entries.body:
DUAL RING
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: B-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Weapons Range (Twice Weapons Range) Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Polearm), M
Cost: 12 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain
Description: You spin your weapon around in a ring around you, extending it with your chakra to create a dual ring of death. All creatures within twice your weapons range must make a Dexterity Saving Throw, taking your twice weapons damage die on a failed save and gaining a rank of bleeding, taking half damage and no effects on a success. Creatures within your normal weapons range make their save at disadvantage and instead take twice your weapons damage on a failed save and 3 ranks of bleeding and half damage and no ranks on a pass.
At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the ranks of bleeding on a failed save by 1.

entries.name: OCEAN PARTER
entries.body:
OCEAN PARTER
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: B-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Weapons Range (20-foot cube) Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Polearm), M
Cost: 12 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain
Description: You slam your weapon down on its end with the force to part the ocean itself. All creatures within a 20-foot cube centered on the slam must make a Strength Saving throw, taking your weapons damage+3d10 on a fail and being knocked up 30 feet. While they are in the air, you gain advantage on Melee attacks against them and if they fall at the end of the current turn. If they fall sooner than that, the fall damage die is increased to a d8.
At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d10. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank, the fall damage die instead becomes a d10. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, the fall damage die instead becomes a 12 and creatures have disadvantage on their saving throw.

entries.name: SUN SPEAR
entries.body:
SUN SPEAR
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: B-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Weapon’s Range (30-foot cone)
Duration: Instant
Components: W (Melee Piercing), M
Cost: 12 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain
Description: You spin your weapon along its edge fast enough to ignite the very air before stabbing forwards, looking to impale your foe with the fury of the sun. Make a Melee Taijutsu attack against a creature in range. On a hit your deal your weapons damage+5d10 fire damage and on hit or miss, All creatures in a 30-foot cone from the point of impact, excluding the original target, must succeed a Dexterity saving throw, taking the fire damage rolled on a failure and half on a success.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

entries.name: WITCH HUNTER
entries.body:
WITCH HUNTER
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: B-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Self (15-foot cone)
Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Polearm), M
Cost: 12 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain, Clash
Description: You spin your weapon with a cruel smile and
reel back to deliver a deadly swing that would dismantle apart any witch. Each creature in a 15-foot cone must make a Dexterity saving throw, or take your weapons damage + 6d10 force damage and gain 2 ranks of weakened on a failed save. Creatures within 5 feet of you make this saving throw at disadvantage. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage and no additional effects. If a creature is concentrating on a jutsu and fails the save, concentration immediately ends. On a successful save they still make their concentration check at disadvantage. If this jutsu clashes with a Ninjutsu, you gain advantage on the clash check.
At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d10.
A-RANK:

entries.name: AFTERIMAGE STORM
entries.body:
AFTERIMAGE STORM
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: A-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Self (Weapon range radius sphere.) Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Polearm), M Cost: 16 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain Description: You spin, around striking any and everything that stands in your path. Make a Taijutsu attack targeting all creatures in range. On a hit you deal your weapons damage and all creatures must make a Dexterity Saving throw, hit or miss. If you crit with this attack all creatures make their saves at disadvantage. On a failed save, the after images of the weapon strikes them repeatable. They take your weapons damage+10d4 and gain 3 ranks of bleeding. On a success they take half damage and if they were still hit, gain 1 rank of bleeding.
At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost by 3, the damage by 2d4.

entries.name: BENTHIC DESCENT
entries.body:

Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: A-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Action
Range: Weapons Range
Duration: Instant Components: W (Any Melee Piercing) M
Cost: 16 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu
Description: You strike your foe into the air before quickly following up with a strike to slam them down. A target creature in range must make a Strength Saving Throw, taking your weapons damage on a failure. You then can make a Melee Taijutsu attack at advantage against a creature who fails, dealing your weapons damage+6d10 on a success and knocking them prone and inflicting 2 ranks of weakened. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, you can instead force all creatures in weapons range to make the Strength Saving Throw.

entries.name: NADEGIRI
entries.body:
NADEGIRI
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: A-rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapon Range Duration: instant. Components: M, W (Melee Piercing). Cost: 16 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu. Description: You make an attack so fast and precise that the target does not notice it as happened until it is too late, strong enough to destroy enemies taller than buildings, hiding behind the thicker steel. Make a melee Taijutsu attack, if the target of this jutsu is huge or bigger, you make this attack at advantage, on a hit, you deal your [weapon’s damage] + 8d6 Piercing damage. If your attack beats the creatures AC by 5 or more, you ignore all DR (damage reduction) that creature has.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank above B-rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, and the damage by 2d6, starting at A-rank, this jutsu ignores resistance and threats immunity as resistance.

entries.name: OVERCOMER
entries.body:
OVERCOMER
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: A-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Self (30 foot long, 15-foot-wide line) Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Polearm), M Cost: 16 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain Description: You dash forward, swinging your weapons side to side as you charge with the power to overcome a frontline of any army that stands before you. Make one attack roll and compare to the AC of all hostile creatures in a 60 foot long, 15-foot-wide line in front of you as you dash to the end of the line. This movement does not trigger Attacks of opportunities against anyone except for those who are within 10 feet of you when you cast this jutsu. On a hit, you deal your weapons damage +8d6 and all creatures hit must make a Strength Saving Throw. On a failed save they are knocked prone and thrown to be within 5 feet of you at the end of the line. If that space is occupied, they move to the next available and closest space.
At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost by 3, the range by 30 feet and the damage by 2d6

entries.name: STANCHION SKY PILLAR
entries.body:
STANCHION SKY PILLAR
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: A-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapons range (30-foot radius sphere.) Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Polearm), M Cost: 16 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain Description: You slam your weapon down like a pillar from the palace of the gods, caring not with what is below the point of impact. Make a Melee Taijutsu attack against a creature in range, dealing twice your weapons damage+3d12 and becoming Staggered on a hit. If the target creature was prone, your critical threat range increases by +1 for this attack. If they are already Staggered you instead deal thrice your weapons damage. Afterwards on a hit, you can force out the energy generated from the attack, forcing all hostile creatures within 30 feet of the target creature to make a Strength Saving throw, taking half of the damage rolled and being knocked back to the edge of the sphere, gaining 2 ranks of Bruised.
At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost by 3, the range by 30 feet and the damage by 2d6
S-RANK:

entries.name: DEMON HUNTER
entries.body:
DEMON HUNTER
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: S-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: 20-foot radius sphere Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Polearm), M Cost: 24 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain, Clash Description: You spin your weapon with a cruel smile and reel back to deliver a deadly swing that would dismantle apart any devil. Make one Melee Taijutsu attack targeting Each creature in a 20-foot radius sphere. Dealing your weapons damage+10d10 force damage and gain 3 ranks of weakened and 2 ranks of Lacerated on a failed save. If a creature is concentrating on a jutsu and is hit the concentration immediately ends if it is below S-Rank or the creature has a higher level then you. If it does not immediately end, then they still make their concentration check at disadvantage. If this jutsu clashes with another jutsu, you gain advantage on the clash check and the triggering creature gains disadvantage.

entries.name: RAZOR'S SWIFT
entries.body:
RAZOR'S SWIFT
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: S-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapons reach Duration: Instant Components: M, Weapon (any polearm) Cost: 24 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu, Chain Description: You jab your weapon into your opponent’s torso, then twirl it above your head at rapid speeds manipulating the air pressure around you, pulling nearby enemies in. Make a melee Taijutsu attack, on hit, the target takes your weapons damage, then all creatures within your weapons reach+10 feet must a Strength saving throw. Creatures that fail take damage equal to your weapons damage die+5d8 and are pulled 15 feet toward you, or half as much damage on success with no additional effects.
POWER
Power techniques utilize heavy weapons. Jutsu that focus on the use of heavy, blunt weapons such as hammers, maces, and clubs. These jutsu often enhance the concussive force, weight, or durability of the weapon, allowing for powerful strikes that can crush bones and shatter defenses.
D-RANK:

entries.name: 2-CROSS STRIKE
entries.body:
2-CROSS STRIKE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapon Range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Power), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You perform a double striking slash with your weapon, attacking two different angles forming an “X” at the intersections of the attack. Make two melee Taijutsu dealing your [Weapons Damage].
Chain 1: Affected creatures must make a Strength saving throw, gaining a rank of Bruised on a failed save.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

REBOUND SWING
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Bonus Action, when you miss with a Melee attack with a Bludgeoning weapon Range: Weapon’s range Duration: Instant

entries.name: WEAPON BREAK
entries.body:
WEAPON BREAK
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage from a melee attack. Range: Self Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Power), M Cost: 5 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You quickly react to being hit by using your weapon to catch the attacking weapon at a vulnerable angle. The creature who triggered this reaction must make a Dexterity saving throw, having their weapon break on a failed save. If the triggering creatures’ weapon has Weapon Seals, it can only be broken by a weapon which has an equal or greater bonus to attack and/or damage rolls or an equal or greater ranked weapon enhancement seal.
Chain 1: A creature whose weapon you break, can be targeted with a melee Taijutsu attack as part of this reaction, dealing you [Weapons Damage] + 2d8 on a hit.

entries.body:
DEMONIC DANCE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapons Range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Power), M Cost: 5 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You spin around with your weapon, a dance-like attack that bewilders enemies. Make a Melee Taijutsu attack, comparing the result against the AC of all creatures within your weapons range. On a hit, you deal your weapon damage+1d6.
Chain 1: Affected creatures cannot make an opportunity attack against you, until the beginning of their next turn. At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

entries.name: KNEE BREAKER
entries.body:
KNEE BREAKER
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapons Range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Power), M Cost: 5 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: A series of low strikes at an opponent's lower body with the intent to ruin their legs. Make 2 melee Taijutsu Attacks at a target creature in range. On a hit, you deal your [Weapon Damage]. If you hit a creature twice with this jutsu, they are knocked prone.
Chain 1: Affected creatures that is knocked prone from this jutsu must spend its full movement to stand up.
At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d6.
MONKEY KING’S STANCE
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: Special (When you deal damage with a bludgeoning weapon) Range: Self Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Power), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You channel the energy from the strike into your weapon and hold that energy in a passive state as it builds up, much like the Monkey King himself. You can cast this jutsu when you deal damage with your weapon to take the stance, and its effects change depending on the circumstances you release the jutsu. You can only maintain this jutsu until the end of your next turn, after which, it ends.
Action: You leap up and bring your weapon down on the head of your enemy. Make a Melee Taijutsu Attack against a creature in your weapons range. On a hit, you deal your weapon's damage +3d8 and the target creature must make a Strength saving throw, becoming Concussed on a failed save.
Bonus Action: You dash to the side and make a wide strike at the legs of your opponent. A target creature within 10 feet of you must make a Strength Saving throw, being knocked prone on a failure.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the Action damage 1d8 .

entries.name: MONKEY KINGS TAIL
entries.body:
MONKEY KINGS TAIL
Classification: Bukijutsu Rank: D-Rank Casting Time: 1 Action Range: Weapons Range Duration: Instant
Components: W (Any Power), M Cost: 4 Chakra Keywords: Bukijutsu Description: You swing your weapon around your body before locking it behind your back using both of your hands and performing a sideways spin, slamming it into all creatures in front of you.
Make a melee Taijutsu attack against a creature you can see within range dealing your weapons damage + 3d6.
Chain 1: If your weapon has ranks of the Reach property, it may reach beyond striking one creature and instead striking multiple creatures in a 5-foot-wide line, with the length of it being determined by however many ranks of Reach it has. For every rank of Reach your weapon has, it extends 5 feet in a straight line. All creatures, excluding your original target, who is in this extended range, must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking your weapons damage on a failed save or no damage on a success.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.
C-RANK:

entries.name: BOLTING SAKURA
entries.body:
BOLTING SAKURA
Classification: Bukijutsu
Rank: C-Rank
Casting Time: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage.
Range: Self
Duration: 1 Round
Components: W (Any Power), M
Cost: 7 Chakra
Keywords: Bukijutsu
Description: You close your defenses as you guard your body with your weapons. You gain a +4 bonus to your AC against the triggering attack and all attacks made against you until the beginning of your next turn. Additionally, each time a creature makes a melee attack against you for the duration, you can make a melee Taijutsu attack against a creature in your weapons range, dealing your [Weapon Damage] + 2d6 on a hit.
Chain 1: Affected creature is disarmed on a hit.
Chain 2: Affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining a rank of Bruised on a failed save.
At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and Damage by 1d6.
